   135→   135→class DatabaseManager:
   136→   136→    """Database manager for initialization and session management."""
   137→   137→
   138→   138→    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):
   139→   139→        if db_path is None:
   140→   140→            config = get_config()
   141→   141→            db_path = config.get('data.database_path', 'data/boss.db')
   142→   142→
   143→   143→        db_file = Path(db_path)
   144→   144→        db_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   145→   145→
   146→   146→        self.db_path = db_path
   147→   147→        # NullPool: each session gets a fresh connection, safe for
   148→   148→        # concurrent Web + background task access to SQLite.
   149→   149→        self.engine = create_engine(
   150→   150→            f'sqlite:///{db_path}',
   151→   151→            echo=False,
   152→   152→            poolclass=NullPool,
   153→   153→            connect_args={"check_same_thread": False},
   154→   154→        )
   155→   155→        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   156→   156→
   157→   157→        self.init_db()
   158→   158→        logger.info(f"Database initialized at: {db_path}")
   159→   159→
   160→   160→    def init_db(self):
   161→   161→        """Create all tables and run pending migrations."""
   162→   162→        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
   163→   163→        logger.info("Database tables created successfully")
   164→   164→
   165→   165→        from src.models.migrations import run_migrations
   166→   166→        run_migrations(self.engine)
   167→   167→
   168→   168→    @contextmanager
   169→   169→    def session_scope(self):
   170→   170→        """Provide a transactional scope with auto commit/rollback/close."""
   171→   171→        session = self.Session()
   172→   172→        try:
   173→   173→            yield session
   174→   174→            session.commit()
   175→   175→        except Exception:
   176→   176→            session.rollback()
   177→   177→            raise
   178→   178→        finally:
   179→   179→            session.close()
   180→   180→
   181→   181→    def drop_all(self):
   182→   182→        """Drop all tables (use with caution!)."""
   183→   183→        Base.metadata.drop_all(self.engine)
   184→   184→        logger.warning("All database tables dropped")
   185→   185→
   186→   186→
   187→   187→# Global database manager instance
   188→   188→_db_manager = None
   189→   189→
   190→   190→
   191→   191→def get_db_manager() -> DatabaseManager:
   192→   192→    """Get global database manager instance."""
   193→   193→    global _db_manager
   194→   194→    if _db_manager is None:
   195→   195→        _db_manager = DatabaseManager()
   196→   196→    return _db_manager
   197→   197→
   198→   198→
   199→   199→def reset_db_manager() -> None:
   200→   200→    """Reset global database manager (for testing)."""
   201→   201→    global _db_manager
   202→   202→    _db_manager = None
   203→   203→

1→     1→"""Candidate search module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→
     3→     3→Handles searching for candidates on Boss直聘's talent search pages.
     4→     4→Search page: /web/chat/search — candidates are inside iframe[name='searchFrame'].
     5→     5→
     6→     6→CRITICAL ARCHITECTURE NOTE:
     7→     7→The search results live inside an iframe (searchFrame), NOT the main page DOM.
     8→     8→All evaluate() calls must target the iframe frame, not page directly.
     9→     9→Search uses "换一换" button to refresh results, not infinite scroll.
    10→    10→Candidate IDs come from data-expect attribute on card links.
    11→    11→"""
    12→    12→
    13→    13→import hashlib
    14→    14→from dataclasses import dataclass, field
    15→    15→from typing import List, Optional, Set
    16→    16→
    17→    17→from patchright.async_api import Page, Frame
    18→    18→from loguru import logger
    19→    19→from rich.console import Console
    20→    20→from rich.table import Table
    21→    21→
    22→    22→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    23→    23→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    24→    24→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    25→    25→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    26→    26→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    27→    27→from src.models.database import Candidate, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
    28→    28→console = Console()
    29→    29→
    30→    30→
    31→    31→@dataclass
    32→    32→class CandidateBasic:
    33→    33→    """Basic candidate info extracted from search results."""
    34→    34→    boss_id: str
    35→    35→    name: str
    36→    36→    title: str
    37→    37→    company: str
    38→    38→    location: Optional[str] = None
    39→    39→    salary_expect: Optional[str] = None
    40→    40→    work_years: Optional[str] = None
    41→    41→    education_level: Optional[str] = None
    42→    42→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    43→    43→    active_status: Optional[str] = None
    44→    44→    school: Optional[str] = None
    45→    45→    major: Optional[str] = None
    46→    46→    job_status: Optional[str] = None
    47→    47→    self_desc: Optional[str] = None
    48→    48→    _score: int = field(default=0, init=False, repr=False)
    49→    49→
    50→    50→    def __hash__(self):
    51→    51→        return hash(self.boss_id)
    52→    52→
    53→    53→    def __eq__(self, other):
    54→    54→        if isinstance(other, CandidateBasic):
    55→    55→            return self.boss_id == other.boss_id
    56→    56→        return False
    57→    57→
    58→    58→
    59→    59→# Non-R&D roles to filter out
    60→    60→NON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    61→    61→    "销售", "产品经理", "市场", "运营", "行政", "人事", "财务",
    62→    62→    "法务", "采购", "客服", "前台", "助理", "秘书",
    63→    63→}
    64→    64→
    65→    65→
    66→    66→def _is_non_rd_role(title: str) -> bool:
    67→    67→    """Check if title indicates a non-R&D role."""
    68→    68→    if not title:
    69→    69→        return False
    70→    70→    for keyword in NON_RD_KEYWORDS:
    71→    71→        if keyword in title:
    72→    72→            return True
    73→    73→    return False
    74→    74→
    75→    75→
    76→    76→def _generate_boss_id(name: str, company: str) -> str:
    77→    77→    """Generate a fallback Boss ID from name + company hash."""
    78→    78→    raw = f"{name}_{company}"
    79→    79→    h = hashlib.sha256(raw.encode()).hexdigest()[:20]
    80→    80→    return f"zp_{h}"
    81→    81→
    82→    82→
    83→    83→async def _get_search_frame(page: Page) -> Optional[Frame]:
    84→    84→    """Get the searchFrame iframe from the main page.
    85→    85→
    86→    86→    Boss直聘 search page loads candidates inside iframe[name='searchFrame'].
    87→    87→    Returns the Frame object for executing JS inside the iframe.
    88→    88→    """
    89→    89→    frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
    90→    90→    if frame:
    91→    91→        return frame
    92→    92→
    93→    93→    # Fallback: find by URL pattern
    94→    94→    for f in page.frames:
    95→    95→        if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
    96→    96→            return f
    97→    97→
    98→    98→    return None
    99→    99→
   100→   100→
   101→   101→# JavaScript extraction for candidates inside searchFrame iframe.
   102→   102→# Targets: div.card-list > li.geek-info-card > a[data-expect]
   103→   103→EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS = """
   104→   104→() => {
   105→   105→    const candidates = [];
   106→   106→    const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.card-list .geek-info-card');
   107→   107→
   108→   108→    for (const card of cards) {
   109→   109→        try {
   110→   110→            const link = card.querySelector('a');
   111→   111→            if (!link) continue;
   112→   112→
   113→   113→            // Candidate ID from data-expect attribute
   114→   114→            const expectId = link.dataset.expect || '';
   115→   115→            if (!expectId) continue;
   116→   116→
   117→   117→            const bossId = 'zp_' + expectId;
   118→   118→
   119→   119→            // Name (anonymized, e.g. "卿**")
   120→   120→            const nameEl = card.querySelector('.name-label');
   121→   121→            const name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   122→   122→            if (!name) continue;
   123→   123→
   124→   124→            // Labels (e.g. "热搜")
   125→   125→            const labelEls = card.querySelectorAll('.card-label');
   126→   126→            const labels = Array.from(labelEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   127→   127→
   128→   128→            // Active status (e.g. "3日内活跃")
   129→   129→            const activeEl = card.querySelector('.active-desc-text');
   130→   130→            const activeStatus = activeEl ? activeEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   131→   131→
   132→   132→            // Info labels: age, work years, education, job status, salary
   133→   133→            const infoLabels = card.querySelectorAll('.info-labels > .label-text');
   134→   134→            const infoTexts = Array.from(infoLabels).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
   135→   135→
   136→   136→            let age = '', workYears = '', education = '', jobStatus = '', salary = '';
   137→   137→            for (const text of infoTexts) {
   138→   138→                if (text.includes('岁')) age = text;
   139→   139→                else if (text.includes('年') && !text.includes('岁')) workYears = text;
   140→   140→                else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => text.includes(d))) education = text;
   141→   141→                else if (text.includes('在职') || text.includes('离职') || text.includes('求职')) jobStatus = text;
   142→   142→                else if (text.includes('K') || text.includes('k') || text.includes('薪')) salary = text;
   143→   143→            }
   144→   144→
   145→   145→            // Self description / detail
   146→   146→            const detailEl = card.querySelector('.info-detail');
   147→   147→            const selfDesc = detailEl ? detailEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   148→   148→
   149→   149→            // Expect city
   150→   150→            const expectCityEls = card.querySelectorAll('.expect-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   151→   151→            const expectCity = Array.from(expectCityEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(' ');
   152→   152→
   153→   153→            // Work experience (company + title)
   154→   154→            const workExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.work-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   155→   155→            const workExpTexts = Array.from(workExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   156→   156→            const company = workExpTexts[0] || '';
   157→   157→            const title = workExpTexts[1] || '';
   158→   158→
   159→   159→            // Education (school + major)
   160→   160→            const eduExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.edu-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   161→   161→            const eduTexts = Array.from(eduExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   162→   162→            const school = eduTexts[0] || '';
   163→   163→            const major = eduTexts[1] || '';
   164→   164→
   165→   165→            // Contact button status
   166→   166→            const contactBtn = card.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   167→   167→            const contactText = contactBtn ? contactBtn.innerText.trim() : '';
   168→   168→
   169→   169→            // Elite/hot candidate flag
   170→   170→            const isElite = link.dataset.elitegeek === '1';
   171→   171→
   172→   172→            candidates.push({
   173→   173→                boss_id: bossId,
   174→   174→                name: name,
   175→   175→                title: title,
   176→   176→                company: company,
   177→   177→                location: expectCity,
   178→   178→                salary_expect: salary,
   179→   179→                work_years: workYears,
   180→   180→                education_level: education,
   181→   181→                active_status: activeStatus,
   182→   182→                school: school,
   183→   183→                major: major,
   184→   184→                job_status: jobStatus,
   185→   185→                self_desc: selfDesc,
   186→   186→                age: age,
   187→   187→                labels: labels,
   188→   188→                is_elite: isElite,
   189→   189→                contact_text: contactText,
   190→   190→                profile_url: ''
   191→   191→            });
   192→   192→        } catch (e) {
   193→   193→            console.error('Error extracting candidate:', e);
   194→   194→        }
   195→   195→    }
   196→   196→
   197→   197→    return candidates;
   198→   198→}
   199→   199→"""
   200→   200→
   201→   201→
   202→   202→async def search_candidates(
   203→   203→    keywords: List[str],
   204→   204→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   205→   205→    max_pages: int = 1,
   206→   206→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   207→   207→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   208→   208→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   209→   209→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   210→   210→    start_page: int = 1,
   211→   211→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   212→   212→    """
   213→   213→    Search for candidates on Boss直聘.
   214→   214→
   215→   215→    Navigates to search page, types keyword in iframe search input,
   216→   216→    extracts candidates from card list, and optionally refreshes
   217→   217→    via "换一换" button for more results.
   218→   218→
   219→   219→    Args:
   220→   220→        keywords: List of search keywords
   221→   221→        location: Location filter (e.g., "北京")
   222→   222→        max_pages: Number of "换一换" refresh rounds per keyword
   223→   223→        experience: Experience filter
   224→   224→        education: Education filter
   225→   225→        salary: Salary filter
   226→   226→        browser: Browser manager instance
   227→   227→        start_page: Starting refresh round (for resume)
   228→   228→
   229→   229→    Returns:
   230→   230→        List of CandidateBasic instances
   231→   231→    """
   232→   232→    if browser is None:
   233→   233→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   234→   234→
   235→   235→    page = browser.page
   236→   236→    if not page:
   237→   237→        page = await browser.start()
   238→   238→
   239→   239→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   240→   240→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   241→   241→
   242→   242→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   243→   243→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   244→   244→    seen_dedup_keys: Set[str] = set()
   245→   245→
   246→   246→    for keyword in keywords:
   247→   247→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]Searching for: {keyword}[/cyan]")
   248→   248→
   249→   249→        # Rate limit check
   250→   250→        await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   251→   251→
   252→   252→        try:
   253→   253→            # Navigate to search page (main page, iframe will load)
   254→   254→            search_url = "https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search"
   255→   255→            await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   256→   256→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   257→   257→
   258→   258→            # Check for captcha on main page
   259→   259→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   260→   260→
   261→   261→            # Get the search iframe
   262→   262→            search_frame = await _get_search_frame(page)
   263→   263→            if not search_frame:
   264→   264→                logger.error("Could not find searchFrame iframe")
   265→   265→                console.print("[red]Search iframe not found. Page structure may have changed.[/red]")
   266→   266→                continue
   267→   267→
   268→   268→            # Wait for search input to be ready inside iframe
   269→   269→            try:
   270→   270→                await search_frame.wait_for_selector('input.search-input', timeout=10000)
   271→   271→            except Exception:
   272→   272→                logger.error("Search input not found in iframe")
   273→   273→                continue
   274→   274→
   275→   275→            # Type keyword in search input
   276→   276→            search_input = await search_frame.query_selector('input.search-input')
   277→   277→            if search_input:
   278→   278→                await search_input.click()
   279→   279→                await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   280→   280→                # Clear and type
   281→   281→                import sys
   282→   282→                select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   283→   283→                await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   284→   284→                await search_input.fill(keyword)
   285→   285→                await page.keyboard.press('Enter')
   286→   286→                await async_random_delay('page_load')
   287→   287→            else:
   288→   288→                logger.error("Search input element not found")
   289→   289→                continue
   290→   290→
   291→   291→            # Wait for card list to appear
   292→   292→            try:
   293→   293→                await search_frame.wait_for_selector('.card-list .geek-info-card', timeout=15000)
   294→   294→            except Exception:
   295→   295→                logger.warning(f"No candidate cards loaded for '{keyword}'")
   296→   296→                continue
   297→   297→
   298→   298→            # Check for quota exhaustion
   299→   299→            if await _check_quota_exhausted(search_frame):
   300→   300→                console.print("[red]Daily contact quota exhausted. Stopping search.[/red]")
   301→   301→                break
   302→   302→
   303→   303→            # Extract candidates from current results + refresh rounds
   304→   304→            total_rounds = start_page + max_pages - 1
   305→   305→            for refresh_round in range(start_page, total_rounds + 1):
   306→   306→                if refresh_round > start_page:
   307→   307→                    console.print(f"  [dim]Refresh round {refresh_round}/{total_rounds} (换一换)...[/dim]")
   308→   308→                    await _refresh_search_results(search_frame)
   309→   309→                    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   310→   310→
   311→   311→                # Extract candidates from current card list
   312→   312→                raw_candidates = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS)
   313→   313→
   314→   314→                if not raw_candidates:
   315→   315→                    logger.warning(f"No candidates found in round {refresh_round} for '{keyword}'")
   316→   316→                    continue
   317→   317→
   318→   318→                # Process results
   319→   319→                round_count = 0
   320→   320→                for raw in raw_candidates:
   321→   321→                    name = raw.get('name', '').strip()
   322→   322→                    title = raw.get('title', '').strip()
   323→   323→                    company = raw.get('company', '').strip()
   324→   324→
   325→   325→                    if not name:
   326→   326→                        continue
   327→   327→
   328→   328→                    # Filter non-R&D roles
   329→   329→                    if _is_non_rd_role(title):
   330→   330→                        continue
   331→   331→
   332→   332→                    # Use boss_id from data-expect
   333→   333→                    boss_id = raw.get('boss_id', '')
   334→   334→                    if not boss_id:
   335→   335→                        boss_id = _generate_boss_id(name, company)
   336→   336→
   337→   337→                    # Deduplicate
   338→   338→                    if boss_id in seen_ids:
   339→   339→                        continue
   340→   340→
   341→   341→                    dedup_key = f"{name}_{company}"
   342→   342→                    if dedup_key in seen_dedup_keys:
   343→   343→                        continue
   344→   344→
   345→   345→                    seen_ids.add(boss_id)
   346→   346→                    seen_dedup_keys.add(dedup_key)
   347→   347→
   348→   348→                    candidate = CandidateBasic(
   349→   349→                        boss_id=boss_id,
   350→   350→                        name=name,
   351→   351→                        title=title,
   352→   352→                        company=company,
   353→   353→                        location=raw.get('location', ''),
   354→   354→                        salary_expect=raw.get('salary_expect', ''),
   355→   355→                        work_years=raw.get('work_years', ''),
   356→   356→                        education_level=raw.get('education_level', ''),
   357→   357→                        profile_url=raw.get('profile_url', ''),
   358→   358→                        active_status=raw.get('active_status', ''),
   359→   359→                        school=raw.get('school', ''),
   360→   360→                        major=raw.get('major', ''),
   361→   361→                        job_status=raw.get('job_status', ''),
   362→   362→                        self_desc=raw.get('self_desc', ''),
   363→   363→                    )
   364→   364→
   365→   365→                    all_candidates.append(candidate)
   366→   366→                    round_count += 1
   367→   367→
   368→   368→                console.print(f"  [green]Round {refresh_round}: {round_count} new candidates[/green]")
   369→   369→
   370→   370→            # Log action
   371→   371→            rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   372→   372→                'keyword': keyword,
   373→   373→                'refresh_rounds': max_pages,
   374→   374→                'results': len([c for c in all_candidates]),
   375→   375→            })
   376→   376→
   377→   377→            # Save search history
   378→   378→            keyword_count = len([c for c in all_candidates if c.boss_id in seen_ids])
   379→   379→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   380→   380→                history = SearchHistory(
   381→   381→                    criteria={
   382→   382→                        'keywords': keyword,
   383→   383→                        'location': location,
   384→   384→                        'refresh_rounds': max_pages,
   385→   385→                        'experience': experience,
   386→   386→                        'education': education,
   387→   387→                        'salary': salary,
   388→   388→                    },
   389→   389→                    results_count=keyword_count,
   390→   390→                )
   391→   391→                session.add(history)
   392→   392→
   393→   393→        except Exception as e:
   394→   394→            logger.error(f"Error searching for '{keyword}': {e}")
   395→   395→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   396→   396→            rate_limiter.report_error()
   397→   397→
   398→   398→    console.print(f"\n[green]Total unique candidates: {len(all_candidates)}[/green]")
   399→   399→
   400→   400→    # Save candidates to database
   401→   401→    _save_candidates_to_db(all_candidates, keywords, db_manager)
   402→   402→
   403→   403→    # Display results summary
   404→   404→    _display_results(all_candidates, keywords)
   405→   405→
   406→   406→    return all_candidates
   407→   407→
   408→   408→
   409→   409→async def _refresh_search_results(frame: Frame) -> None:
   410→   410→    """Click "换一换" button in the search iframe to load new candidates.
   411→   411→
   412→   412→    Boss直聘 search does NOT use infinite scroll. Instead it shows ~30 cards
   413→   413→    and provides a "换一换" button to refresh the list with new candidates.
   414→   414→    """
   415→   415→    try:
   416→   416→        refresh_btn = await frame.query_selector('.change-btn')
   417→   417→        if refresh_btn and await refresh_btn.is_visible():
   418→   418→            await refresh_btn.click()
   419→   419→            # Wait for new cards to load
   420→   420→            await frame.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   421→   421→            return
   422→   422→    except Exception as e:
   423→   423→        logger.warning(f"Could not click refresh button: {e}")
   424→   424→
   425→   425→    # Fallback: scroll the iframe body to trigger any lazy loading
   426→   426→    await frame.evaluate("window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight)")
   427→   427→    await frame.wait_for_timeout(1500)
   428→   428→
   429→   429→
   430→   430→async def _check_quota_exhausted(frame: Frame) -> bool:
   431→   431→    """Check if Boss直聘 shows a quota exhaustion indicator."""
   432→   432→    try:
   433→   433→        result = await frame.evaluate("""
   434→   434→            () => {
   435→   435→                const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   436→   436→                const quotaIndicators = [
   437→   437→                    '今日沟通次数已用完',
   438→   438→                    '沟通次数已达上限',
   439→   439→                    '今日联系人数已满',
   440→   440→                    '升级会员',
   441→   441→                    '开通会员享更多沟通'
   442→   442→                ];
   443→   443→                for (const indicator of quotaIndicators) {
   444→   444→                    if (bodyText.includes(indicator)) {
   445→   445→                        return true;
   446→   446→                    }
   447→   447→                }
   448→   448→                return false;
   449→   449→            }
   450→   450→        """)
   451→   451→        return result
   452→   452→    except Exception:
   453→   453→        return False
   454→   454→
   455→   455→
   456→   456→def _save_candidates_to_db(
   457→   457→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   458→   458→    keywords: List[str],
   459→   459→    db_manager,
   460→   460→) -> None:
   461→   461→    """Save or update candidates in the database."""
   462→   462→    source = ', '.join(keywords)
   463→   463→
   464→   464→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   465→   465→        # Batch-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   466→   466→        boss_ids = [c.boss_id for c in candidates]
   467→   467→        existing_map = {}
   468→   468→        for i in range(0, len(boss_ids), 500):
   469→   469→            chunk = boss_ids[i:i + 500]
   470→   470→            rows = session.query(Candidate).filter(
   471→   471→                Candidate.boss_id.in_(chunk)
   472→   472→            ).all()
   473→   473→            for row in rows:
   474→   474→                existing_map[row.boss_id] = row
   475→   475→
   476→   476→        for c in candidates:
   477→   477→            existing = existing_map.get(c.boss_id)
   478→   478→            if existing:
   479→   479→                existing.name = c.name or existing.name
   480→   480→                existing.title = c.title or existing.title
   481→   481→                existing.company = c.company or existing.company
   482→   482→                existing.location = c.location or existing.location
   483→   483→                existing.salary_expect = c.salary_expect or existing.salary_expect
   484→   484→                existing.work_years = c.work_years or existing.work_years
   485→   485→                existing.education_level = c.education_level or existing.education_level
   486→   486→                existing.profile_url = c.profile_url or existing.profile_url
   487→   487→                if source and source not in (existing.source_search or ''):
   488→   488→                    existing.source_search = f"{existing.source_search or ''}, {source}".strip(', ')
   489→   489→            else:
   490→   490→                new_candidate = Candidate(
   491→   491→                    boss_id=c.boss_id,
   492→   492→                    name=c.name,
   493→   493→                    title=c.title,
   494→   494→                    company=c.company,
   495→   495→                    location=c.location,
   496→   496→                    salary_expect=c.salary_expect,
   497→   497→                    work_years=c.work_years,
   498→   498→                    education_level=c.education_level,
   499→   499→                    profile_url=c.profile_url,
   500→   500→                    source_search=source,
   501→   501→                )
   502→   502→                session.add(new_candidate)
   503→   503→
   504→   504→
   505→   505→def _display_results(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], keywords: List[str]) -> None:
   506→   506→    """Display search results in a Rich table."""
   507→   507→    if not candidates:
   508→   508→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found.[/yellow]")
   509→   509→        return
   510→   510→
   511→   511→    table = Table(title=f"Search Results ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   512→   512→    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim", max_width=20)
   513→   513→    table.add_column("Name", style="bold")
   514→   514→    table.add_column("Title")
   515→   515→    table.add_column("Company")
   516→   516→    table.add_column("Education")
   517→   517→    table.add_column("Salary")
   518→   518→    table.add_column("Experience")
   519→   519→    table.add_column("Active", style="green")
   520→   520→
   521→   521→    for c in candidates[:50]:
   522→   522→        table.add_row(
   523→   523→            c.boss_id[:20],
   524→   524→            c.name,
   525→   525→            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   526→   526→            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   527→   527→            c.education_level or "",
   528→   528→            c.salary_expect or "",
   529→   529→            c.work_years or "",
   530→   530→            c.active_status or "",
   531→   531→        )
   532→   532→
   533→   533→    console.print(table)
   534→   534→
   535→   535→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   536→   536→        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(candidates) - 50} more candidates[/dim]")
   537→   537→

1→     1→"""Profile extraction module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→
     3→     3→Extracts candidate profile information from Boss直聘.
     4→     4→
     5→     5→CRITICAL LIMITATION (verified 2026-03-03):
     6→     6→Profile details in the resume overlay are wasm-rendered — the DOM inside
     7→     7→.resume-detail-wrap is empty. We CANNOT extract detailed resume via DOM.
     8→     8→
     9→     9→Profile data sources:
    10→    10→1. Search card data (from searchFrame iframe) — best source for basic info
    11→    11→2. Resume overlay header/footer — job position, contact status
    12→    12→3. Chat page conversation — limited info
    13→    13→
    14→    14→The extract_profile function now primarily uses search card data
    15→    15→and supplements with whatever is available from the resume overlay.
    16→    16→"""
    17→    17→
    18→    18→from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
    19→    19→
    20→    20→from patchright.async_api import Page, Frame
    21→    21→from loguru import logger
    22→    22→from rich.console import Console
    23→    23→from rich.panel import Panel
    24→    24→
    25→    25→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    26→    26→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    27→    27→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    28→    28→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    29→    29→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    30→    30→from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
    31→    31→from src.exceptions.errors import ExtractionError
    32→    32→
    33→    33→console = Console()
    34→    34→
    35→    35→
    36→    36→# JavaScript extraction for candidate profile from search card (inside searchFrame iframe).
    37→    37→# This extracts all available data from the card since resume detail is wasm-rendered.
    38→    38→EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS = """
    39→    39→(expectId) => {
    40→    40→    const link = document.querySelector('a[data-expect="' + expectId + '"]');
    41→    41→    if (!link) return null;
    42→    42→
    43→    43→    const card = link.closest('.geek-info-card');
    44→    44→    if (!card) return null;
    45→    45→
    46→    46→    const result = {
    47→    47→        name: '',
    48→    48→        title: '',
    49→    49→        company: '',
    50→    50→        location: '',
    51→    51→        salary_expect: '',
    52→    52→        work_years: '',
    53→    53→        education_level: '',
    54→    54→        basic_info: {},
    55→    55→        education: [],
    56→    56→        work_experience: [],
    57→    57→        skills: []
    58→    58→    };
    59→    59→
    60→    60→    // Name
    61→    61→    const nameEl = card.querySelector('.name-label');
    62→    62→    result.name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    63→    63→
    64→    64→    // Info labels: age, work years, education, job status, salary
    65→    65→    const infoLabels = card.querySelectorAll('.info-labels > .label-text');
    66→    66→    const infoTexts = Array.from(infoLabels).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
    67→    67→
    68→    68→    for (const text of infoTexts) {
    69→    69→        if (text.includes('岁')) {
    70→    70→            result.basic_info.age = text;
    71→    71→        } else if (text.includes('年') && !text.includes('岁')) {
    72→    72→            result.work_years = text;
    73→    73→            result.basic_info.work_years = text;
    74→    74→        } else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => text.includes(d))) {
    75→    75→            result.education_level = text;
    76→    76→            result.basic_info.education = text;
    77→    77→        } else if (text.includes('在职') || text.includes('离职') || text.includes('求职')) {
    78→    78→            result.basic_info.job_status = text;
    79→    79→        } else if (text.includes('K') || text.includes('k')) {
    80→    80→            result.salary_expect = text;
    81→    81→        }
    82→    82→    }
    83→    83→
    84→    84→    // Active status
    85→    85→    const activeEl = card.querySelector('.active-desc-text');
    86→    86→    if (activeEl) result.basic_info.active_status = activeEl.innerText.trim();
    87→    87→
    88→    88→    // Labels (e.g. "热搜")
    89→    89→    const labelEls = card.querySelectorAll('.card-label');
    90→    90→    result.basic_info.labels = Array.from(labelEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    91→    91→
    92→    92→    // Self description
    93→    93→    const detailEl = card.querySelector('.info-detail');
    94→    94→    if (detailEl) result.basic_info.self_description = detailEl.innerText.trim();
    95→    95→
    96→    96→    // Expect city
    97→    97→    const expectCityEls = card.querySelectorAll('.expect-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
    98→    98→    result.location = Array.from(expectCityEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(' ');
    99→    99→
   100→   100→    // Work experience
   101→   101→    const workExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.work-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   102→   102→    const workTexts = Array.from(workExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   103→   103→    if (workTexts.length >= 1) {
   104→   104→        result.company = workTexts[0];
   105→   105→        result.title = workTexts[1] || '';
   106→   106→        result.work_experience.push({
   107→   107→            company: workTexts[0],
   108→   108→            title: workTexts[1] || ''
   109→   109→        });
   110→   110→    }
   111→   111→
   112→   112→    // Education
   113→   113→    const eduEls = card.querySelectorAll('.edu-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   114→   114→    const eduTexts = Array.from(eduEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   115→   115→    if (eduTexts.length >= 1) {
   116→   116→        result.education.push({
   117→   117→            school: eduTexts[0],
   118→   118→            major: eduTexts[1] || ''
   119→   119→        });
   120→   120→    }
   121→   121→
   122→   122→    // Elite flag
   123→   123→    result.basic_info.is_elite = link.dataset.elitegeek === '1';
   124→   124→
   125→   125→    return result;
   126→   126→}
   127→   127→"""
   128→   128→
   129→   129→
   130→   130→# JavaScript extraction for resume overlay (main page DOM).
   131→   131→# Limited data since resume content is wasm-rendered.
   132→   132→EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS = """
   133→   133→() => {
   134→   134→    const dialog = document.querySelector('.dialog-wrap.active .dialog-lib-resume');
   135→   135→    if (!dialog) return null;
   136→   136→
   137→   137→    const result = {};
   138→   138→
   139→   139→    // Position info from footer
   140→   140→    const positionEl = dialog.querySelector('.position-name');
   141→   141→    if (positionEl) result.chat_position = positionEl.innerText.trim();
   142→   142→
   143→   143→    // Chat history from right panel
   144→   144→    const historyEls = dialog.querySelectorAll('.chat-history-process .action');
   145→   145→    result.chat_history = Array.from(historyEls).slice(0, 5).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
   146→   146→
   147→   147→    // Contact button text
   148→   148→    const contactBtn = dialog.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   149→   149→    if (contactBtn) result.contact_status = contactBtn.innerText.trim();
   150→   150→
   151→   151→    return result;
   152→   152→}
   153→   153→"""
   154→   154→
   155→   155→
   156→   156→async def extract_profile(
   157→   157→    boss_id: str,
   158→   158→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   159→   159→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   160→   160→    """
   161→   161→    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
   162→   162→
   163→   163→    Uses search card data as the primary source since the resume
   164→   164→    overlay is wasm-rendered and has empty DOM.
   165→   165→
   166→   166→    Args:
   167→   167→        boss_id: Boss直聘 candidate ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
   168→   168→        browser: Browser manager instance
   169→   169→
   170→   170→    Returns:
   171→   171→        Dictionary with profile data
   172→   172→
   173→   173→    Raises:
   174→   174→        ExtractionError: If profile extraction fails
   175→   175→    """
   176→   176→    if browser is None:
   177→   177→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   178→   178→
   179→   179→    page = browser.page
   180→   180→    if not page:
   181→   181→        page = await browser.start()
   182→   182→
   183→   183→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   184→   184→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   185→   185→
   186→   186→    # Rate limit check
   187→   187→    await async_check_rate_limit('view_profile')
   188→   188→
   189→   189→    expect_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   190→   190→
   191→   191→    try:
   192→   192→        profile_data = None
   193→   193→
   194→   194→        # Strategy 1: Extract from search card in iframe (best source)
   195→   195→        search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   196→   196→        if not search_frame:
   197→   197→            for f in page.frames:
   198→   198→                if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   199→   199→                    search_frame = f
   200→   200→                    break
   201→   201→
   202→   202→        if search_frame:
   203→   203→            profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   204→   204→
   205→   205→        # Strategy 2: If not on search page, navigate there
   206→   206→        if not profile_data:
   207→   207→            await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search',
   208→   208→                                   wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   209→   209→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   210→   210→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   211→   211→
   212→   212→            search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   213→   213→            if not search_frame:
   214→   214→                for f in page.frames:
   215→   215→                    if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   216→   216→                        search_frame = f
   217→   217→                        break
   218→   218→
   219→   219→            if search_frame:
   220→   220→                profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   221→   221→
   222→   222→        # Strategy 3: Use database data as fallback
   223→   223→        if not profile_data:
   224→   224→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   225→   225→                candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   226→   226→                if candidate:
   227→   227→                    profile_data = {
   228→   228→                        'name': candidate.name or '',
   229→   229→                        'title': candidate.title or '',
   230→   230→                        'company': candidate.company or '',
   231→   231→                        'location': candidate.location or '',
   232→   232→                        'salary_expect': candidate.salary_expect or '',
   233→   233→                        'work_years': candidate.work_years or '',
   234→   234→                        'education_level': candidate.education_level or '',
   235→   235→                        'basic_info': candidate.basic_info or {},
   236→   236→                        'education': candidate.education or [],
   237→   237→                        'work_experience': candidate.work_experience or [],
   238→   238→                        'skills': candidate.skills or [],
   239→   239→                    }
   240→   240→
   241→   241→        if not profile_data:
   242→   242→            raise ExtractionError(f"No profile data found for {boss_id}")
   243→   243→
   244→   244→        # Try to supplement with overlay data (if resume dialog is open)
   245→   245→        try:
   246→   246→            overlay_data = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS)
   247→   247→            if overlay_data:
   248→   248→                profile_data.setdefault('basic_info', {})
   249→   249→                if overlay_data.get('chat_position'):
   250→   250→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_position'] = overlay_data['chat_position']
   251→   251→                if overlay_data.get('contact_status'):
   252→   252→                    profile_data['basic_info']['contact_status'] = overlay_data['contact_status']
   253→   253→                if overlay_data.get('chat_history'):
   254→   254→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_history'] = overlay_data['chat_history']
   255→   255→        except Exception:
   256→   256→            pass  # Overlay data is supplementary, not critical
   257→   257→
   258→   258→        # Log action
   259→   259→        rate_limiter.log_action('view_profile', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   260→   260→
   261→   261→        # Update database
   262→   262→        _update_profile_in_db(boss_id, profile_data, db_manager)
   263→   263→
   264→   264→        # Display profile
   265→   265→        _display_profile(boss_id, profile_data)
   266→   266→
   267→   267→        return profile_data
   268→   268→
   269→   269→    except ExtractionError:
   270→   270→        raise
   271→   271→    except Exception as e:
   272→   272→        logger.error(f"Error extracting profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   273→   273→        raise ExtractionError(f"Failed to extract profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   274→   274→
   275→   275→
   276→   276→def _update_profile_in_db(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict, db_manager) -> None:
   277→   277→    """Update candidate profile in the database."""
   278→   278→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   279→   279→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   280→   280→
   281→   281→        if not candidate:
   282→   282→            candidate = Candidate(boss_id=boss_id)
   283→   283→            session.add(candidate)
   284→   284→
   285→   285→        # Update fields
   286→   286→        candidate.name = profile_data.get('name') or candidate.name
   287→   287→        candidate.title = profile_data.get('title') or candidate.title
   288→   288→        candidate.company = profile_data.get('company') or candidate.company
   289→   289→        candidate.location = profile_data.get('location') or candidate.location
   290→   290→        candidate.salary_expect = profile_data.get('salary_expect') or candidate.salary_expect
   291→   291→        candidate.work_years = profile_data.get('work_years') or candidate.work_years
   292→   292→        candidate.education_level = profile_data.get('education_level') or candidate.education_level
   293→   293→        candidate.basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info')
   294→   294→        candidate.education = profile_data.get('education')
   295→   295→        candidate.work_experience = profile_data.get('work_experience')
   296→   296→        candidate.skills = profile_data.get('skills')
   297→   297→
   298→   298→
   299→   299→def _display_profile(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict) -> None:
   300→   300→    """Display extracted profile in Rich format."""
   301→   301→    name = profile_data.get('name', 'Unknown')
   302→   302→    title = profile_data.get('title', '')
   303→   303→    company = profile_data.get('company', '')
   304→   304→    location = profile_data.get('location', '')
   305→   305→    salary = profile_data.get('salary_expect', '')
   306→   306→    work_years = profile_data.get('work_years', '')
   307→   307→    education_level = profile_data.get('education_level', '')
   308→   308→
   309→   309→    # Header
   310→   310→    header = f"[bold]{name}[/bold]"
   311→   311→    if title:
   312→   312→        header += f" - {title}"
   313→   313→    if company:
   314→   314→        header += f" @ {company}"
   315→   315→
   316→   316→    console.print(Panel(header, title=f"Profile: {boss_id}", border_style="green"))
   317→   317→
   318→   318→    # Basic info
   319→   319→    info_parts = []
   320→   320→    if location:
   321→   321→        info_parts.append(f"Location: {location}")
   322→   322→    if salary:
   323→   323→        info_parts.append(f"Expected Salary: {salary}")
   324→   324→    if work_years:
   325→   325→        info_parts.append(f"Experience: {work_years}")
   326→   326→    if education_level:
   327→   327→        info_parts.append(f"Education: {education_level}")
   328→   328→
   329→   329→    basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info', {})
   330→   330→    if basic_info.get('age'):
   331→   331→        info_parts.append(f"Age: {basic_info['age']}")
   332→   332→    if basic_info.get('job_status'):
   333→   333→        info_parts.append(f"Status: {basic_info['job_status']}")
   334→   334→    if basic_info.get('active_status'):
   335→   335→        info_parts.append(f"Active: {basic_info['active_status']}")
   336→   336→
   337→   337→    if info_parts:
   338→   338→        console.print("  " + " | ".join(info_parts))
   339→   339→
   340→   340→    # Education
   341→   341→    education = profile_data.get('education', [])
   342→   342→    if education:
   343→   343→        console.print("\n  [cyan]Education:[/cyan]")
   344→   344→        for edu in education:
   345→   345→            parts = []
   346→   346→            if edu.get('school'):
   347→   347→                parts.append(edu['school'])
   348→   348→            if edu.get('degree'):
   349→   349→                parts.append(edu['degree'])
   350→   350→            if edu.get('major'):
   351→   351→                parts.append(edu['major'])
   352→   352→            console.print(f"    - {' | '.join(parts)}")
   353→   353→
   354→   354→    # Work experience
   355→   355→    work_exp = profile_data.get('work_experience', [])
   356→   356→    if work_exp:
   357→   357→        console.print("\n  [cyan]Work Experience:[/cyan]")
   358→   358→        for work in work_exp:
   359→   359→            line = ""
   360→   360→            if work.get('company'):
   361→   361→                line += work['company']
   362→   362→            if work.get('title'):
   363→   363→                line += f" - {work['title']}"
   364→   364→            if work.get('period'):
   365→   365→                line += f" ({work['period']})"
   366→   366→            console.print(f"    - {line}")
   367→   367→
   368→   368→    # Skills
   369→   369→    skills = profile_data.get('skills', [])
   370→   370→    if skills:
   371→   371→        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Skills:[/cyan] {', '.join(skills)}")
   372→   372→
   373→   373→    # Self description
   374→   374→    if basic_info.get('self_description'):
   375→   375→        desc = basic_info['self_description'][:200]
   376→   376→        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Self Description:[/cyan]\n    {desc}")
   377→   377→
   378→   378→    console.print()
   379→   379→

content.content:
1→     1→"""Pipeline service for Boss直聘 recruitment automation.
     2→     2→
     3→     3→Orchestrates the full recruitment pipeline:
     4→     4→Search candidates → Score → Confirm → Batch send messages
     5→     5→
     6→     6→Supports checkpoint-based resume for interrupted pipelines.
     7→     7→"""
     8→     8→
     9→     9→from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Set
    10→    10→
    11→    11→from loguru import logger
    12→    12→from rich.console import Console
    13→    13→from rich.panel import Panel
    14→    14→from rich.table import Table
    15→    15→
    16→    16→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17→    17→from src.modules.search import search_candidates, CandidateBasic
    18→    18→from src.modules.message import send_message_batch
    19→    19→from src.utils.config import get_config
    20→    20→from src.utils.scoring import sort_candidates_by_score, reset_scoring_cache
    21→    21→from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
    22→    22→from src.utils.delays import reset_session
    23→    23→from src.utils.progress import emit_progress
    24→    24→
    25→    25→console = Console()
    26→    26→
    27→    27→
    28→    28→async def search_all_keywords(
    29→    29→    keywords: tuple,
    30→    30→    location: Optional[str] = None,
    31→    31→    max_pages: int = 3,
    32→    32→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
    33→    33→    education: Optional[str] = None,
    34→    34→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
    35→    35→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    36→    36→    start_page: int = 1,
    37→    37→    seen_ids: Optional[Set[str]] = None,
    38→    38→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    39→    39→    """Search across multiple keywords with deduplication."""
    40→    40→    if browser is None:
    41→    41→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    42→    42→
    43→    43→    keyword_list = list(keywords)
    44→    44→
    45→    45→    emit_progress("search_start", keywords=keyword_list, max_pages=max_pages)
    46→    46→
    47→    47→    all_candidates = await search_candidates(
    48→    48→        keywords=keyword_list,
    49→    49→        location=location,
    50→    50→        max_pages=max_pages,
    51→    51→        experience=experience,
    52→    52→        education=education,
    53→    53→        salary=salary,
    54→    54→        browser=browser,
    55→    55→        start_page=start_page,
    56→    56→    )
    57→    57→
    58→    58→    # Filter out already-seen candidates
    59→    59→    if seen_ids:
    60→    60→        all_candidates = [c for c in all_candidates if c.boss_id not in seen_ids]
    61→    61→
    62→    62→    emit_progress("search_complete", total_candidates=len(all_candidates))
    63→    63→
    64→    64→    return all_candidates
    65→    65→
    66→    66→
    67→    67→def _build_candidate_info_for_llm(candidate) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    68→    68→    """Build candidate info dict for LLM scoring."""
    69→    69→    if isinstance(candidate, dict):
    70→    70→        return {
    71→    71→            "name": candidate.get("name", ""),
    72→    72→            "title": candidate.get("title", ""),
    73→    73→            "company": candidate.get("company", ""),
    74→    74→            "education_level": candidate.get("education_level", ""),
    75→    75→            "work_years": candidate.get("work_years", ""),
    76→    76→            "skills": candidate.get("skills", []),
    77→    77→            "work_experience": candidate.get("work_experience", []),
    78→    78→        }
    79→    79→    return {
    80→    80→        "name": getattr(candidate, "name", ""),
    81→    81→        "title": getattr(candidate, "title", ""),
    82→    82→        "company": getattr(candidate, "company", ""),
    83→    83→        "education_level": getattr(candidate, "education_level", ""),
    84→    84→        "work_years": getattr(candidate, "work_years", ""),
    85→    85→        "skills": getattr(candidate, "skills", []) or [],
    86→    86→        "work_experience": getattr(candidate, "work_experience", []) or [],
    87→    87→    }
    88→    88→
    89→    89→
    90→    90→def _get_boss_id(candidate) -> str:
    91→    91→    """Extract boss_id from candidate (dict or object)."""
    92→    92→    if isinstance(candidate, dict):
    93→    93→        return candidate.get("boss_id", "")
    94→    94→    return getattr(candidate, "boss_id", "")
    95→    95→
    96→    96→
    97→    97→async def send_batch(
    98→    98→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
    99→    99→    template_name: str,
   100→   100→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   101→   101→    keywords: tuple,
   102→   102→    interactive: bool = True,
   103→   103→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   104→   104→    dry_run: bool = False,
   105→   105→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   106→   106→) -> Dict[str, int]:
   107→   107→    """Score candidates and send batch messages."""
   108→   108→    if not candidates:
   109→   109→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to message.[/yellow]")
   110→   110→        return {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   111→   111→
   112→   112→    emit_progress("scoring_start", count=len(candidates))
   113→   113→
   114→   114→    # Sort by score (highest priority first)
   115→   115→    sorted_candidates = sort_candidates_by_score(
   116→   116→        candidates,
   117→   117→        search_keywords=list(keywords),
   118→   118→    )
   119→   119→
   120→   120→    # --- Optional LLM scoring ---
   121→   121→    llm_results: Dict[str, Dict] = {}
   122→   122→    llm_enabled = False
   123→   123→    try:
   124→   124→        config = get_config()
   125→   125→        llm_enabled = config.get("scoring.llm.enabled", False)
   126→   126→    except Exception:
   127→   127→        pass
   128→   128→
   129→   129→    if llm_enabled:
   130→   130→        try:
   131→   131→            from src.utils.llm_scorer import (
   132→   132→                check_ollama_available,
   133→   133→                llm_score_candidates_batch,
   134→   134→            )
   135→   135→
   136→   136→            endpoint = config.get("scoring.llm.endpoint", "http://127.0.0.1:11434")
   137→   137→            model = config.get("scoring.llm.model", "qwen2.5:7b")
   138→   138→            timeout = config.get("scoring.llm.timeout_seconds", 60)
   139→   139→            jd_config = config.get("scoring.jd") or {}
   140→   140→
   141→   141→            if await check_ollama_available(endpoint):
   142→   142→                console.print("[cyan]LLM scoring enabled, evaluating candidates...[/cyan]")
   143→   143→
   144→   144→                # Build candidate info list
   145→   145→                candidates_info = [
   146→   146→                    _build_candidate_info_for_llm(c) for c in sorted_candidates
   147→   147→                ]
   148→   148→
   149→   149→                results = await llm_score_candidates_batch(
   150→   150→                    candidates_info, jd_config, endpoint, model, timeout,
   151→   151→                )
   152→   152→
   153→   153→                # Merge LLM scores
   154→   154→                llm_weight = config.get("scoring.weights.llm_score", 5)
   155→   155→                total_weights = sum(
   156→   156→                    v for k, v in (config.get("scoring.weights") or {}).items()
   157→   157→                )
   158→   158→                if total_weights <= 0:
   159→   159→                    total_weights = 100
   160→   160→
   161→   161→                for c, r in zip(sorted_candidates, results):
   162→   162→                    bid = _get_boss_id(c)
   163→   163→                    if r and r.get("score") is not None:
   164→   164→                        llm_results[bid] = r
   165→   165→                        # Blend LLM score into existing score
   166→   166→                        current = getattr(c, '_score', 0) if not isinstance(c, dict) else c.get("_score", 0)
   167→   167→                        llm_contribution = int(round(r["score"] / 100.0 * llm_weight / total_weights * 100))
   168→   168→                        new_score = min(current + llm_contribution, 100)
   169→   169→                        if isinstance(c, dict):
   170→   170→                            c["_score"] = new_score
   171→   171→                        else:
   172→   172→                            c._score = new_score
   173→   173→
   174→   174→                # Re-sort after LLM score merge
   175→   175→                sorted_candidates.sort(
   176→   176→                    key=lambda x: (x.get("_score", 0) if isinstance(x, dict) else getattr(x, "_score", 0)),
   177→   177→                    reverse=True,
   178→   178→                )
   179→   179→
   180→   180→                console.print(f"[green]LLM scoring complete: {len(llm_results)}/{len(sorted_candidates)} evaluated[/green]")
   181→   181→            else:
   182→   182→                console.print("[yellow]Ollama not available, skipping LLM scoring[/yellow]")
   183→   183→        except Exception as e:
   184→   184→            logger.warning(f"LLM scoring integration error: {e}")
   185→   185→            console.print(f"[yellow]LLM scoring skipped: {e}[/yellow]")
   186→   186→
   187→   187→    emit_progress(
   188→   188→        "scoring_complete",
   189→   189→        top_score=getattr(sorted_candidates[0], '_score', 0) if sorted_candidates else 0,
   190→   190→    )
   191→   191→
   192→   192→    # Display scored candidates
   193→   193→    has_llm = bool(llm_results)
   194→   194→    table = Table(title=f"Candidates Ranked by Score ({len(sorted_candidates)} total)")
   195→   195→    table.add_column("Score", style="bold", width=6)
   196→   196→    table.add_column("Name")
   197→   197→    table.add_column("Title")
   198→   198→    table.add_column("Company")
   199→   199→    if has_llm:
   200→   200→        table.add_column("LLM", width=40)
   201→   201→    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim")
   202→   202→
   203→   203→    for c in sorted_candidates[:20]:
   204→   204→        score = getattr(c, '_score', 0)
   205→   205→        bid = _get_boss_id(c)
   206→   206→        row = [
   207→   207→            str(score),
   208→   208→            c.name,
   209→   209→            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   210→   210→            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   211→   211→        ]
   212→   212→        if has_llm:
   213→   213→            llm_info = llm_results.get(bid)
   214→   214→            if llm_info:
   215→   215→                row.append(f"[{llm_info['score']}] {llm_info.get('explanation', '')[:30]}")
   216→   216→            else:
   217→   217→                row.append("-")
   218→   218→        row.append(bid[:20])
   219→   219→        table.add_row(*row)
   220→   220→
   221→   221→    console.print(table)
   222→   222→    if len(sorted_candidates) > 20:
   223→   223→        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(sorted_candidates) - 20} more[/dim]")
   224→   224→
   225→   225→    emit_progress("send_start", total=len(sorted_candidates))
   226→   226→
   227→   227→    # Send messages
   228→   228→    stats = await send_message_batch(
   229→   229→        candidates=sorted_candidates,
   230→   230→        template_name=template_name,

   232→   232→        interactive=interactive,
   233→   233→        skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   234→   234→        dry_run=dry_run,
   235→   235→        browser=browser,
   236→   236→    )
   237→   237→
   238→   238→    emit_progress("send_complete", **stats)
   239→   239→
   240→   240→    return stats
