    37→    37→    37→    seen_ids: Optional[Set[str]] = None,
    38→    38→    38→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    39→    39→    39→    """Search across multiple keywords with deduplication."""
    40→    40→    40→    if browser is None:
    41→    41→    41→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    42→    42→    42→
    43→    43→    43→    keyword_list = list(keywords)
    44→    44→    44→
    45→    45→    45→    emit_progress("search_start", keywords=keyword_list, max_pages=max_pages)
    46→    46→    46→
    47→    47→    47→    all_candidates = await search_candidates(
    48→    48→    48→        keywords=keyword_list,
    49→    49→    49→        location=location,
    50→    50→    50→        max_pages=max_pages,
    51→    51→    51→        experience=experience,
    52→    52→    52→        education=education,
    53→    53→    53→        salary=salary,
    54→    54→    54→        browser=browser,
    55→    55→    55→        start_page=start_page,
    56→    56→    56→    )
    57→    57→    57→
    58→    58→    58→    # Filter out already-seen candidates
    59→    59→    59→    if seen_ids:
    60→    60→    60→        all_candidates = [c for c in all_candidates if c.boss_id not in seen_ids]
    61→    61→    61→
    62→    62→    62→    emit_progress("search_complete", total_candidates=len(all_candidates))
    63→    63→    63→
    64→    64→    64→    return all_candidates
    65→    65→    65→
    66→    66→    66→
    67→    67→    67→def _build_candidate_info_for_llm(candidate) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    68→    68→    68→    """Build candidate info dict for LLM scoring."""
    69→    69→    69→    if isinstance(candidate, dict):
    70→    70→    70→        return {
    71→    71→    71→            "name": candidate.get("name", ""),
    72→    72→    72→            "title": candidate.get("title", ""),
    73→    73→    73→            "company": candidate.get("company", ""),
    74→    74→    74→            "education_level": candidate.get("education_level", ""),
    75→    75→    75→            "work_years": candidate.get("work_years", ""),
    76→    76→    76→            "skills": candidate.get("skills", []),
    77→    77→    77→            "work_experience": candidate.get("work_experience", []),
    78→    78→    78→        }
    79→    79→    79→    return {
    80→    80→    80→        "name": getattr(candidate, "name", ""),
    81→    81→    81→        "title": getattr(candidate, "title", ""),
    82→    82→    82→        "company": getattr(candidate, "company", ""),
    83→    83→    83→        "education_level": getattr(candidate, "education_level", ""),
    84→    84→    84→        "work_years": getattr(candidate, "work_years", ""),
    85→    85→    85→        "skills": getattr(candidate, "skills", []) or [],
    86→    86→    86→        "work_experience": getattr(candidate, "work_experience", []) or [],
    87→    87→    87→    }
    88→    88→    88→
    89→    89→    89→
    90→    90→    90→def _get_boss_id(candidate) -> str:
    91→    91→    91→    """Extract boss_id from candidate (dict or object)."""
    92→    92→    92→    if isinstance(candidate, dict):
    93→    93→    93→        return candidate.get("boss_id", "")
    94→    94→    94→    return getattr(candidate, "boss_id", "")
    95→    95→    95→
    96→    96→    96→
    97→    97→    97→async def send_batch(
    98→    98→    98→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
    99→    99→    99→    template_name: str,
   100→   100→   100→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   101→   101→   101→    keywords: tuple,
   102→   102→   102→    interactive: bool = True,
   103→   103→   103→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   104→   104→   104→    dry_run: bool = False,
   105→   105→   105→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   106→   106→   106→) -> Dict[str, int]:
   107→   107→   107→    """Score candidates and send batch messages."""
   108→   108→   108→    if not candidates:
   109→   109→   109→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to message.[/yellow]")
   110→   110→   110→        return {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   111→   111→   111→
   112→   112→   112→    emit_progress("scoring_start", count=len(candidates))
   113→   113→   113→
   114→   114→   114→    # Sort by score (highest priority first)
   115→   115→   115→    sorted_candidates = sort_candidates_by_score(
   116→   116→   116→        candidates,
   117→   117→   117→        search_keywords=list(keywords),
   118→   118→   118→    )
   119→   119→   119→
   120→   120→   120→    # --- Optional LLM scoring ---
   121→   121→   121→    llm_results: Dict[str, Dict] = {}
   122→   122→   122→    llm_enabled = False
   123→   123→   123→    try:
   124→   124→   124→        config = get_config()
   125→   125→   125→        llm_enabled = config.get("scoring.llm.enabled", False)
   126→   126→   126→    except Exception:
   127→   127→   127→        pass
   128→   128→   128→
   129→   129→   129→    if llm_enabled:
   130→   130→   130→        try:
   131→   131→   131→            from src.utils.llm_scorer import (
   132→   132→   132→                check_ollama_available,
   133→   133→   133→                llm_score_candidates_batch,
   134→   134→   134→            )
   135→   135→   135→
   136→   136→   136→            endpoint = config.get("scoring.llm.endpoint", "http://127.0.0.1:11434")
   137→   137→   137→            model = config.get("scoring.llm.model", "qwen2.5:7b")
   138→   138→   138→            timeout = config.get("scoring.llm.timeout_seconds", 60)
   139→   139→   139→            jd_config = config.get("scoring.jd") or {}
   140→   140→   140→
   141→   141→   141→            if await check_ollama_available(endpoint):
   142→   142→   142→                console.print("[cyan]LLM scoring enabled, evaluating candidates...[/cyan]")
   143→   143→   143→
   144→   144→   144→                # Build candidate info list
   145→   145→   145→                candidates_info = [
   146→   146→   146→                    _build_candidate_info_for_llm(c) for c in sorted_candidates
   147→   147→   147→                ]
   148→   148→   148→
   149→   149→   149→                results = await llm_score_candidates_batch(
   150→   150→   150→                    candidates_info, jd_config, endpoint, model, timeout,
   151→   151→   151→                )
   152→   152→   152→
   153→   153→   153→                # Merge LLM scores
   154→   154→   154→                llm_weight = config.get("scoring.weights.llm_score", 5)
   155→   155→   155→                total_weights = sum(
   156→   156→   156→                    v for k, v in (config.get("scoring.weights") or {}).items()
   157→   157→   157→                )
   158→   158→   158→                if total_weights <= 0:
   159→   159→   159→                    total_weights = 100
   160→   160→   160→
   161→   161→   161→                for c, r in zip(sorted_candidates, results):
   162→   162→   162→                    bid = _get_boss_id(c)
   163→   163→   163→                    if r and r.get("score") is not None:
   164→   164→   164→                        llm_results[bid] = r
   165→   165→   165→                        # Blend LLM score into existing score
   166→   166→   166→                        current = getattr(c, '_score', 0) if not isinstance(c, dict) else c.get("_score", 0)
   167→   167→   167→                        llm_contribution = int(round(r["score"] / 100.0 * llm_weight / total_weights * 100))
   168→   168→   168→                        new_score = min(current + llm_contribution, 100)
   169→   169→   169→                        if isinstance(c, dict):
   170→   170→   170→                            c["_score"] = new_score
   171→   171→   171→                        else:
   172→   172→   172→                            c._score = new_score
   173→   173→   173→
   174→   174→   174→                # Re-sort after LLM score merge
   175→   175→   175→                sorted_candidates.sort(
   176→   176→   176→                    key=lambda x: (x.get("_score", 0) if isinstance(x, dict) else getattr(x, "_score", 0)),
   177→   177→   177→                    reverse=True,
   178→   178→   178→                )
   179→   179→   179→
   180→   180→   180→                console.print(f"[green]LLM scoring complete: {len(llm_results)}/{len(sorted_candidates)} evaluated[/green]")
   181→   181→   181→            else:
   182→   182→   182→                console.print("[yellow]Ollama not available, skipping LLM scoring[/yellow]")
   183→   183→   183→        except Exception as e:
   184→   184→   184→            logger.warning(f"LLM scoring integration error: {e}")
   185→   185→   185→            console.print(f"[yellow]LLM scoring skipped: {e}[/yellow]")
   186→   186→   186→
   187→   187→   187→    emit_progress(
   188→   188→   188→        "scoring_complete",
   189→   189→   189→        top_score=getattr(sorted_candidates[0], '_score', 0) if sorted_candidates else 0,
   190→   190→   190→    )
   191→   191→   191→
   192→   192→   192→    # Display scored candidates
   193→   193→   193→    has_llm = bool(llm_results)
   194→   194→   194→    table = Table(title=f"Candidates Ranked by Score ({len(sorted_candidates)} total)")
   195→   195→   195→    table.add_column("Score", style="bold", width=6)
   196→   196→   196→    table.add_column("Name")
   197→   197→   197→    table.add_column("Title")
   198→   198→   198→    table.add_column("Company")
   199→   199→   199→    if has_llm:
   200→   200→   200→        table.add_column("LLM", width=40)
   201→   201→   201→    table.add_column("Boss ID", style="dim")
   202→   202→   202→
   203→   203→   203→    for c in sorted_candidates[:20]:
   204→   204→   204→        score = getattr(c, '_score', 0)
   205→   205→   205→        bid = _get_boss_id(c)
   206→   206→   206→        row = [
   207→   207→   207→            str(score),
   208→   208→   208→            c.name,
   209→   209→   209→            c.title[:30] if c.title else "",
   210→   210→   210→            c.company[:20] if c.company else "",
   211→   211→   211→        ]
   212→   212→   212→        if has_llm:
   213→   213→   213→            llm_info = llm_results.get(bid)
   214→   214→   214→            if llm_info:
   215→   215→   215→                row.append(f"[{llm_info['score']}] {llm_info.get('explanation', '')[:30]}")
   216→   216→   216→            else:
   217→   217→   217→                row.append("-")
   218→   218→   218→        row.append(bid[:20])
   219→   219→   219→        table.add_row(*row)
   220→   220→   220→
   221→   221→   221→    console.print(table)
   222→   222→   222→    if len(sorted_candidates) > 20:
   223→   223→   223→        console.print(f"[dim]...and {len(sorted_candidates) - 20} more[/dim]")
   224→   224→   224→
   225→   225→   225→    emit_progress("send_start", total=len(sorted_candidates))
   226→   226→   226→
   227→   227→   227→    # Send messages
   228→   228→   228→    stats = await send_message_batch(
   229→   229→   229→        candidates=sorted_candidates,
   230→   230→   230→        template_name=template_name,
   231→   231→   231→        variables=variables,
   232→   232→   232→        interactive=interactive,
   233→   233→   233→        skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   234→   234→   234→        dry_run=dry_run,
   235→   235→   235→        browser=browser,
   236→   236→   236→    )
   237→   237→   237→
   238→   238→   238→    emit_progress("send_complete", **stats)
   239→   239→   239→
   240→   240→   240→    return stats
   241→   241→   241→
   242→   242→   242→
   243→   243→   243→async def run_pipeline(
   244→   244→   244→    keywords: tuple,
   245→   245→   245→    template_name: str,
   246→   246→   246→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   247→   247→   247→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   248→   248→   248→    max_pages: int = 3,
   249→   249→   249→    batch_pages: int = 0,
   250→   250→   250→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   251→   251→   251→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   252→   252→   252→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   253→   253→   253→    interactive: bool = True,
   254→   254→   254→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   255→   255→   255→    dry_run: bool = False,
   256→   256→   256→    resume: bool = False,
   257→   257→   257→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   258→   258→   258→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   259→   259→   259→    """Run the full pipeline: search → score → batch send."""
   260→   260→   260→    if browser is None:
   261→   261→   261→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   262→   262→   262→
   263→   263→   263→    reset_session()
   264→   264→   264→    reset_scoring_cache()
   265→   265→   265→
   266→   266→   266→    # Handle resume
   267→   267→   267→    checkpoint = None
   268→   268→   268→    start_page = 1
   269→   269→   269→    sent_ids: List[str] = []
   270→   270→   270→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   271→   271→   271→
   272→   272→   272→    if resume:
   273→   273→   273→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager.load_latest()
   274→   274→   274→        if checkpoint:
   275→   275→   275→            # Validate that checkpoint parameters match current run
   276→   276→   276→            cp_params = checkpoint.params
   277→   277→   277→            cp_keywords = tuple(cp_params.get('keywords', []))
   278→   278→   278→            cp_template = cp_params.get('template', '')
   279→   279→   279→            if cp_keywords != keywords or cp_template != template_name:
   280→   280→   280→                console.print(Panel(
   281→   281→   281→                    f"[yellow]Checkpoint mismatch:[/yellow]\n"
   282→   282→   282→                    f"  Checkpoint: keywords={cp_keywords}, template={cp_template}\n"
   283→   283→   283→                    f"  Current:    keywords={keywords}, template={template_name}\n"
   284→   284→   284→                    f"[bold]Starting fresh instead of resuming.[/bold]",
   285→   285→   285→                    title="Checkpoint Mismatch",
   286→   286→   286→                    border_style="red"
   287→   287→   287→                ))
   288→   288→   288→                checkpoint = None
   289→   289→   289→            else:
   290→   290→   290→                console.print(Panel(
   291→   291→   291→                    checkpoint.summary,
   292→   292→   292→                    title="Resuming Pipeline",
   293→   293→   293→                    border_style="yellow"
   294→   294→   294→                ))
   295→   295→   295→                start_page = checkpoint.completed_pages + 1
   296→   296→   296→                sent_ids = checkpoint.sent_ids
   297→   297→   297→                seen_ids = checkpoint.seen_ids
   298→   298→   298→        else:
   299→   299→   299→            console.print("[yellow]No checkpoint found, starting fresh.[/yellow]")
   300→   300→   300→
   301→   301→   301→    if checkpoint is None:
   302→   302→   302→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   303→   303→   303→
   304→   304→   304→    # Pipeline header
   305→   305→   305→    console.print(Panel(
   306→   306→   306→        f"[bold]Keywords:[/bold] {', '.join(keywords)}\n"
   307→   307→   307→        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   308→   308→   308→        f"[bold]Pages:[/bold] {max_pages}\n"
   309→   309→   309→        f"[bold]Location:[/bold] {location or 'Any'}\n"
   310→   310→   310→        f"[bold]Experience:[/bold] {experience or 'Any'}\n"
   311→   311→   311→        f"[bold]Education:[/bold] {education or 'Any'}\n"
   312→   312→   312→        f"[bold]Salary:[/bold] {salary or 'Any'}\n"
   313→   313→   313→        f"[bold]Dry Run:[/bold] {'Yes' if dry_run else 'No'}",
   314→   314→   314→        title="Boss直聘 Pipeline",
   315→   315→   315→        border_style="cyan"
   316→   316→   316→    ))
   317→   317→   317→
   318→   318→   318→    total_stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   319→   319→   319→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   320→   320→   320→
   321→   321→   321→    if batch_pages > 0:
   322→   322→   322→        # Batch mode: search N pages, then send, repeat
   323→   323→   323→        for page_start in range(start_page, max_pages + 1, batch_pages):
   324→   324→   324→            page_end = min(page_start + batch_pages - 1, max_pages)
   325→   325→   325→            pages_this_batch = page_end - page_start + 1
   326→   326→   326→
   327→   327→   327→            console.print(f"\n[cyan]--- Batch: pages {page_start}-{page_end} ---[/cyan]")
   328→   328→   328→
   329→   329→   329→            # Search
   330→   330→   330→            batch_candidates = await search_all_keywords(
   331→   331→   331→                keywords=keywords,
   332→   332→   332→                location=location,
   333→   333→   333→                max_pages=pages_this_batch,
   334→   334→   334→                experience=experience,
   335→   335→   335→                education=education,
   336→   336→   336→                salary=salary,
   337→   337→   337→                browser=browser,
   338→   338→   338→                start_page=page_start,
   339→   339→   339→                seen_ids=seen_ids,
   340→   340→   340→            )
   341→   341→   341→
   342→   342→   342→            if not batch_candidates:
   343→   343→   343→                console.print("[yellow]No new candidates in this batch.[/yellow]")
   344→   344→   344→                continue
   345→   345→   345→
   346→   346→   346→            # Track seen IDs
   347→   347→   347→            for c in batch_candidates:
   348→   348→   348→                seen_ids.add(c.boss_id)
   349→   349→   349→
   350→   350→   350→            all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   351→   351→   351→
   352→   352→   352→            # Send batch
   353→   353→   353→            batch_stats = await send_batch(
   354→   354→   354→                candidates=batch_candidates,
   355→   355→   355→                template_name=template_name,
   356→   356→   356→                variables=variables,
   357→   357→   357→                keywords=keywords,
   358→   358→   358→                interactive=interactive,
   359→   359→   359→                skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   360→   360→   360→                dry_run=dry_run,
   361→   361→   361→                browser=browser,
   362→   362→   362→            )
   363→   363→   363→
   364→   364→   364→            # Update totals
   365→   365→   365→            for key in total_stats:
   366→   366→   366→                total_stats[key] += batch_stats.get(key, 0)
   367→   367→   367→
   368→   368→   368→            # Track processed candidate IDs for checkpoint
   369→   369→   369→            sent_id_set = set(sent_ids)
   370→   370→   370→            for c in batch_candidates:
   371→   371→   371→                if c.boss_id not in sent_id_set:
   372→   372→   372→                    sent_ids.append(c.boss_id)
   373→   373→   373→                    sent_id_set.add(c.boss_id)
   374→   374→   374→
   375→   375→   375→            # Save checkpoint
   376→   376→   376→            checkpoint.save(
   377→   377→   377→                keywords=keywords,
   378→   378→   378→                template=template_name,
   379→   379→   379→                variables=variables,
   380→   380→   380→                company=(),
   381→   381→   381→                location=location,
   382→   382→   382→                max_pages=max_pages,
   383→   383→   383→                batch_pages=batch_pages,
   384→   384→   384→                skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   385→   385→   385→                interactive=interactive,
   386→   386→   386→                completed_pages=page_end,
   387→   387→   387→                sent_ids=sent_ids,
   388→   388→   388→                seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   389→   389→   389→                dry_run=dry_run,
   390→   390→   390→            )
   391→   391→   391→    else:
   392→   392→   392→        # Non-batch mode: search all pages, then send all
   393→   393→   393→        all_candidates = await search_all_keywords(
   394→   394→   394→            keywords=keywords,
   395→   395→   395→            location=location,
   396→   396→   396→            max_pages=max_pages,
   397→   397→   397→            experience=experience,
   398→   398→   398→            education=education,
   399→   399→   399→            salary=salary,
   400→   400→   400→            browser=browser,
   401→   401→   401→            start_page=start_page,
   402→   402→   402→            seen_ids=seen_ids,
   403→   403→   403→        )
   404→   404→   404→
   405→   405→   405→        if all_candidates:
   406→   406→   406→            for c in all_candidates:
   407→   407→   407→                seen_ids.add(c.boss_id)
   408→   408→   408→
   409→   409→   409→            total_stats = await send_batch(
   410→   410→   410→                candidates=all_candidates,
   411→   411→   411→                template_name=template_name,
   412→   412→   412→                variables=variables,
   413→   413→   413→                keywords=keywords,
   414→   414→   414→                interactive=interactive,
   415→   415→   415→                skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   416→   416→   416→                dry_run=dry_run,
   417→   417→   417→                browser=browser,
   418→   418→   418→            )
   419→   419→   419→
   420→   420→   420→    # Final report
   421→   421→   421→    console.print(Panel(
   422→   422→   422→        f"[bold]Candidates found:[/bold] {len(all_candidates)}\n"
   423→   423→   423→        f"[green]Messages sent:[/green] {total_stats['sent']}\n"
   424→   424→   424→        f"[red]Failed:[/red] {total_stats['failed']}\n"
   425→   425→   425→        f"[yellow]Skipped:[/yellow] {total_stats['skipped']}\n"
   426→   426→   426→        f"[dim]Cancelled:[/dim] {total_stats['cancelled']}",
   427→   427→   427→        title="Pipeline Complete",
   428→   428→   428→        border_style="green"
   429→   429→   429→    ))
   430→   430→   430→
   431→   431→   431→    # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   432→   432→   432→    if checkpoint:
   433→   433→   433→        checkpoint.delete()
   434→   434→   434→
   435→   435→   435→    result = {
   436→   436→   436→        'candidates_found': len(all_candidates),
   437→   437→   437→        **total_stats,
   438→   438→   438→    }
   439→   439→   439→
   440→   440→   440→    emit_progress("pipeline_complete", **result)
   441→   441→   441→
   442→   442→   442→    return result
   443→   443→   443→

1→     1→     1→"""Message sending module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→Handles sending templated messages to candidates through Boss直聘's
     4→     4→     4→chat system. Supports single and batch message sending with
     5→     5→     5→human confirmation and rate limiting.
     6→     6→     6→
     7→     7→     7→Boss直聘 chat flow (verified 2026-03-03):
     8→     8→     8→1. Navigate to /web/chat/index (chat page)
     9→     9→     9→2. Click on conversation in left panel: div.geek-item[data-id="uid-0"]
    10→    10→    10→3. Type message in #boss-chat-editor-input (contenteditable div)
    11→    11→    11→4. Click div.submit ("发送") to send
    12→    12→    12→5. Close dialog via span.iboss-close
    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→CRITICAL: Chat input is #boss-chat-editor-input (NOT #boss-chat-global-input).
    15→    15→    15→Send button is div.submit (NOT a <button> element).
    16→    16→    16→"""
    17→    17→    17→
    18→    18→    18→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    19→    19→    19→from typing import Dict, List, Optional
    20→    20→    20→
    21→    21→    21→from patchright.async_api import Page
    22→    22→    22→from loguru import logger
    23→    23→    23→from rich.console import Console
    24→    24→    24→from rich.panel import Panel
    25→    25→    25→
    26→    26→    26→import questionary
    27→    27→    27→
    28→    28→    28→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    29→    29→    29→from src.utils.config import get_config
    30→    30→    30→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    31→    31→    31→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    32→    32→    32→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    33→    33→    33→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    34→    34→    34→from src.utils.validators import validate_template_variables
    35→    35→    35→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    36→    36→    36→from src.exceptions.errors import (
    37→    37→    37→    BrowserError,
    38→    38→    38→    PermanentFailureError,

    41→    41→    41→

    45→    45→    45→def render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    46→    46→    46→    """
    47→    47→    47→    Render a message template with variable substitution.
    48→    48→    48→
    49→    49→    49→    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    50→    50→    50→    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).
    51→    51→    51→
    52→    52→    52→    Args:
    53→    53→    53→        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
    54→    54→    54→        variables: Variable name-value pairs
    55→    55→    55→
    56→    56→    56→    Returns:
    57→    57→    57→        Rendered message string
    58→    58→    58→    """
    59→    59→    59→    import re
    60→    60→    60→
    61→    61→    61→    content = template['content']
    62→    62→    62→
    63→    63→    63→    def replacer(match):
    64→    64→    64→        var_name = match.group(1)
    65→    65→    65→        if var_name in variables:
    66→    66→    66→            return str(variables[var_name])
    67→    67→    67→        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable
    68→    68→    68→
    69→    69→    69→    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    70→    70→    70→    return content
    71→    71→    71→
    72→    72→    72→
    73→    73→    73→async def send_message(
    74→    74→    74→    boss_id: str,
    75→    75→    75→    template_name: str,
    76→    76→    76→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    77→    77→    77→    preview_only: bool = False,
    78→    78→    78→    interactive: bool = True,
    79→    79→    79→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    80→    80→    80→) -> bool:
    81→    81→    81→    """
    82→    82→    82→    Send a templated message to a candidate on Boss直聘.
    83→    83→    83→
    84→    84→    84→    Args:
    85→    85→    85→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
    86→    86→    86→        template_name: Name of the message template
    87→    87→    87→        variables: Template variable overrides
    88→    88→    88→        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
    89→    89→    89→        browser: Browser manager instance
    90→    90→    90→
    91→    91→    91→    Returns:
    92→    92→    92→        True if message sent successfully
    93→    93→    93→    """
    94→    94→    94→    if browser is None:
    95→    95→    95→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    96→    96→    96→
    97→    97→    97→    page = browser.page
    98→    98→    98→    if not page:
    99→    99→    99→        page = await browser.start()
   100→   100→   100→
   101→   101→   101→    config = get_config()
   102→   102→   102→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   103→   103→   103→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   104→   104→   104→
   105→   105→   105→    # Load template
   106→   106→   106→    template = config.get_template(template_name)
   107→   107→   107→
   108→   108→   108→    # Merge variables
   109→   109→   109→    final_vars = dict(variables or {})
   110→   110→   110→
   111→   111→   111→    # Try to fill candidate info from database
   112→   112→   112→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   113→   113→   113→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   114→   114→   114→        if candidate:
   115→   115→   115→            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
   116→   116→   116→                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
   117→   117→   117→            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
   118→   118→   118→                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
   119→   119→   119→            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
   120→   120→   120→                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title
   121→   121→   121→
   122→   122→   122→    # Validate variables
   123→   123→   123→    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)
   124→   124→   124→
   125→   125→   125→    # Render message
   126→   126→   126→    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)
   127→   127→   127→
   128→   128→   128→    # Preview
   129→   129→   129→    console.print(Panel(
   130→   130→   130→        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
   131→   131→   131→        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   132→   132→   132→        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
   133→   133→   133→        title="Message Preview",
   134→   134→   134→        border_style="cyan"
   135→   135→   135→    ))
   136→   136→   136→
   137→   137→   137→    if preview_only:
   138→   138→   138→        console.print("[dim]Preview only — message not sent.[/dim]")
   139→   139→   139→        return False
   140→   140→   140→
   141→   141→   141→    # Confirm send — skip confirmation in non-interactive mode (Web)
   142→   142→   142→    import sys
   143→   143→   143→    if not interactive:
   144→   144→   144→        confirm = True
   145→   145→   145→    elif sys.stdin.isatty():
   146→   146→   146→        confirm = questionary.confirm(
   147→   147→   147→            "Send this message?",
   148→   148→   148→            default=False,
   149→   149→   149→        ).ask()
   150→   150→   150→    else:
   151→   151→   151→        confirm = False
   152→   152→   152→
   153→   153→   153→    if not confirm:
   154→   154→   154→        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
   155→   155→   155→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
   156→   156→   156→        return False
   157→   157→   157→
   158→   158→   158→    # Rate limit check
   159→   159→   159→    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   160→   160→   160→
   161→   161→   161→    try:
   162→   162→   162→        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
   163→   163→   163→        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   164→   164→   164→        if not success:
   165→   165→   165→            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")
   166→   166→   166→
   167→   167→   167→        # Type and send the message
   168→   168→   168→        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   169→   169→   169→
   170→   170→   170→        # Log success
   171→   171→   171→        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
   172→   172→   172→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   173→   173→   173→
   174→   174→   174→        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
   175→   175→   175→        return True
   176→   176→   176→
   177→   177→   177→    except PermanentFailureError as e:
   178→   178→   178→        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   179→   179→   179→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   180→   180→   180→        rate_limiter.report_error()
   181→   181→   181→        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
   182→   182→   182→        return False
   183→   183→   183→    except Exception as e:
   184→   184→   184→        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
   185→   185→   185→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   186→   186→   186→        rate_limiter.report_error()
   187→   187→   187→        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   188→   188→   188→        return False
   189→   189→   189→
   190→   190→   190→
   191→   191→   191→async def send_message_batch(
   192→   192→   192→    candidates: list,
   193→   193→   193→    template_name: str,
   194→   194→   194→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
   195→   195→   195→    interactive: bool = True,
   196→   196→   196→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   197→   197→   197→    dry_run: bool = False,
   198→   198→   198→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   199→   199→   199→) -> Dict[str, int]:
   200→   200→   200→    """
   201→   201→   201→    Send messages to multiple candidates.
   202→   202→   202→
   203→   203→   203→    Args:
   204→   204→   204→        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
   205→   205→   205→        template_name: Template name
   206→   206→   206→        variables: Shared template variables
   207→   207→   207→        interactive: Confirm each message individually
   208→   208→   208→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
   209→   209→   209→        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
   210→   210→   210→        browser: Browser manager instance
   211→   211→   211→
   212→   212→   212→    Returns:
   213→   213→   213→        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
   214→   214→   214→    """
   215→   215→   215→    if browser is None:
   216→   216→   216→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   217→   217→   217→
   218→   218→   218→    config = get_config()
   219→   219→   219→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   220→   220→   220→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   221→   221→   221→
   222→   222→   222→    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   223→   223→   223→
   224→   224→   224→    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
   225→   225→   225→        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
   226→   226→   226→            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
   227→   227→   227→            name = candidate.get('name', '')
   228→   228→   228→            title = candidate.get('title', '')
   229→   229→   229→            company = candidate.get('company', '')
   230→   230→   230→        else:
   231→   231→   231→            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
   232→   232→   232→            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
   233→   233→   233→            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
   234→   234→   234→            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')
   235→   235→   235→
   236→   236→   236→        if not boss_id:
   237→   237→   237→            stats['skipped'] += 1
   238→   238→   238→            continue
   239→   239→   239→
   240→   240→   240→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")
   241→   241→   241→
   242→   242→   242→        # Check if already messaged
   243→   243→   243→        if skip_messaged:
   244→   244→   244→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   245→   245→   245→                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   246→   246→   246→                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
   247→   247→   247→                ).first()
   248→   248→   248→                if existing_msg:
   249→   249→   249→                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
   250→   250→   250→                    stats['skipped'] += 1
   251→   251→   251→                    continue
   252→   252→   252→
   253→   253→   253→        if dry_run:
   254→   254→   254→            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run — would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
   255→   255→   255→            stats['sent'] += 1
   256→   256→   256→            continue
   257→   257→   257→
   258→   258→   258→        # Build per-candidate variables
   259→   259→   259→        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
   260→   260→   260→        if name:
   261→   261→   261→            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
   262→   262→   262→        if company:
   263→   263→   263→            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
   264→   264→   264→        if title:
   265→   265→   265→            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)
   266→   266→   266→
   267→   267→   267→        try:
   268→   268→   268→            if interactive:
   269→   269→   269→                result = await send_message(
   270→   270→   270→                    boss_id=boss_id,
   271→   271→   271→                    template_name=template_name,
   272→   272→   272→                    variables=per_vars,
   273→   273→   273→                    browser=browser,
   274→   274→   274→                )
   275→   275→   275→                if result:
   276→   276→   276→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   277→   277→   277→                else:
   278→   278→   278→                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
   279→   279→   279→            else:
   280→   280→   280→                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
   281→   281→   281→                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   282→   282→   282→
   283→   283→   283→                template = config.get_template(template_name)
   284→   284→   284→                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
   285→   285→   285→                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)
   286→   286→   286→
   287→   287→   287→                page = browser.page
   288→   288→   288→                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   289→   289→   289→                if success:
   290→   290→   290→                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   291→   291→   291→                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   292→   292→   292→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   293→   293→   293→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   294→   294→   294→                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
   295→   295→   295→                else:
   296→   296→   296→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   297→   297→   297→                    stats['failed'] += 1
   298→   298→   298→                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")
   299→   299→   299→
   300→   300→   300→        except Exception as e:
   301→   301→   301→            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   302→   302→   302→            stats['failed'] += 1
   303→   303→   303→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   304→   304→   304→
   305→   305→   305→        # Delay between messages
   306→   306→   306→        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
   307→   307→   307→            await async_random_delay('message')
   308→   308→   308→
   309→   309→   309→    # Summary
   310→   310→   310→    console.print(Panel(
   311→   311→   311→        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
   312→   312→   312→        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
   313→   313→   313→        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
   314→   314→   314→        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
   315→   315→   315→        title="Batch Message Summary",
   316→   316→   316→    ))
   317→   317→   317→
   318→   318→   318→    return stats
   319→   319→   319→
   320→   320→   320→
   321→   321→   321→async def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
   322→   322→   322→    """
   323→   323→   323→    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.
   324→   324→   324→
   325→   325→   325→    Strategy 1: Go to /web/chat/index and find conversation by name
   326→   326→   326→    Strategy 2: Use search page contact button (requires 搜索畅聊卡)
   327→   327→   327→
   328→   328→   328→    Args:
   329→   329→   329→        page: Playwright page instance
   330→   330→   330→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
   331→   331→   331→        db_manager: Database manager
   332→   332→   332→
   333→   333→   333→    Returns:
   334→   334→   334→        True if chat window is ready for input
   335→   335→   335→    """
   336→   336→   336→    # Get candidate info from database
   337→   337→   337→    candidate_name = None
   338→   338→   338→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   339→   339→   339→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   340→   340→   340→        if candidate:
   341→   341→   341→            candidate_name = candidate.name
   342→   342→   342→
   343→   343→   343→    # Strategy 1: Navigate to chat page and find existing conversation
   344→   344→   344→    try:
   345→   345→   345→        await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/index',
   346→   346→   346→                               wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   347→   347→   347→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   348→   348→   348→        await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   349→   349→   349→
   350→   350→   350→        # Wait for conversation list to load
   351→   351→   351→        try:
   352→   352→   352→            await page.wait_for_selector('.geek-item', timeout=10000)
   353→   353→   353→        except Exception:
   354→   354→   354→            logger.warning("Conversation list did not load")
   355→   355→   355→
   356→   356→   356→        # Try to find the candidate in the conversation list
   357→   357→   357→        # Match by data-id (which is the user ID, different from data-expect)
   358→   358→   358→        # or by name text match
   359→   359→   359→        if candidate_name:
   360→   360→   360→            found = await page.evaluate("""
   361→   361→   361→                (name) => {
   362→   362→   362→                    const items = document.querySelectorAll('.geek-item');
   363→   363→   363→                    for (const item of items) {
   364→   364→   364→                        if (item.innerText.includes(name)) {
   365→   365→   365→                            item.click();
   366→   366→   366→                            return true;
   367→   367→   367→                        }
   368→   368→   368→                    }
   369→   369→   369→                    return false;
   370→   370→   370→                }
   371→   371→   371→            """, candidate_name)
   372→   372→   372→
   373→   373→   373→            if found:
   374→   374→   374→                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   375→   375→   375→                # Verify chat input is visible
   376→   376→   376→                chat_input = await page.query_selector('#boss-chat-editor-input')
   377→   377→   377→                if chat_input and await chat_input.is_visible():
   378→   378→   378→                    return True
   379→   379→   379→                logger.warning("Chat input not visible after clicking conversation")
   380→   380→   380→
   381→   381→   381→    except Exception as e:
   382→   382→   382→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 1 (chat page) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   383→   383→   383→
   384→   384→   384→    # Strategy 2: Navigate to search page and use contact button
   385→   385→   385→    # This requires 搜索畅聊卡 and may trigger purchase dialog
   386→   386→   386→    expect_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   387→   387→   387→    try:
   388→   388→   388→        await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search',
   389→   389→   389→                               wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   390→   390→   390→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   391→   391→   391→
   392→   392→   392→        # Get search iframe
   393→   393→   393→        search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   394→   394→   394→        if not search_frame:
   395→   395→   395→            for f in page.frames:
   396→   396→   396→                if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   397→   397→   397→                    search_frame = f
   398→   398→   398→                    break
   399→   399→   399→
   400→   400→   400→        if search_frame:
   401→   401→   401→            # Find the candidate card by data-expect and click contact
   402→   402→   402→            clicked = await search_frame.evaluate("""
   403→   403→   403→                (expectId) => {
   404→   404→   404→                    const link = document.querySelector('a[data-expect="' + expectId + '"]');
   405→   405→   405→                    if (!link) return false;
   406→   406→   406→                    const card = link.closest('.geek-info-card');
   407→   407→   407→                    if (!card) return false;
   408→   408→   408→                    const btn = card.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   409→   409→   409→                    if (btn) {
   410→   410→   410→                        btn.click();
   411→   411→   411→                        return true;
   412→   412→   412→                    }
   413→   413→   413→                    return false;
   414→   414→   414→                }
   415→   415→   415→            """, expect_id)
   416→   416→   416→
   417→   417→   417→            if clicked:
   418→   418→   418→                await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   419→   419→   419→                # Check if chat opened (not a purchase dialog)
   420→   420→   420→                chat_input = await page.query_selector('#boss-chat-editor-input')
   421→   421→   421→                if chat_input and await chat_input.is_visible():
   422→   422→   422→                    return True
   423→   423→   423→
   424→   424→   424→                # Close any purchase dialogs
   425→   425→   425→                await _close_purchase_dialogs(page)
   426→   426→   426→
   427→   427→   427→    except Exception as e:
   428→   428→   428→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 2 (search contact) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   429→   429→   429→
   430→   430→   430→    logger.error(f"All chat navigation strategies failed for {boss_id}")
   431→   431→   431→    return False
   432→   432→   432→
   433→   433→   433→
   434→   434→   434→async def _close_purchase_dialogs(page: Page) -> None:
   435→   435→   435→    """Close purchase/promotional dialogs that may appear after clicking contact."""
   436→   436→   436→    await page.evaluate("""
   437→   437→   437→        () => {
   438→   438→   438→            document.querySelectorAll('.dialog-wrap.active').forEach(d => {
   439→   439→   439→                const wrapper = d.querySelector('.boss-popup__wrapper');
   440→   440→   440→                const cls = wrapper?.className || '';
   441→   441→   441→                if (cls.includes('discounts') || cls.includes('chat-card') || cls.includes('sale')) {
   442→   442→   442→                    const close = d.querySelector('.boss-popup__close, .iboss-close');
   443→   443→   443→                    if (close) close.click();
   444→   444→   444→                }
   445→   445→   445→            });
   446→   446→   446→        }
   447→   447→   447→    """)
   448→   448→   448→    await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
   449→   449→   449→
   450→   450→   450→
   451→   451→   451→async def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
   452→   452→   452→    """
   453→   453→   453→    Type a message into the chat input and send it.
   454→   454→   454→
   455→   455→   455→    Chat input: #boss-chat-editor-input (contenteditable div)
   456→   456→   456→    Send button: div.submit (text "发送")
   457→   457→   457→
   458→   458→   458→    Args:
   459→   459→   459→        page: Playwright page instance
   460→   460→   460→        message: Message text to send
   461→   461→   461→    """
   462→   462→   462→    # Find the message input
   463→   463→   463→    # Verified: #boss-chat-editor-input is the chat input (contenteditable div)
   464→   464→   464→    input_selectors = [
   465→   465→   465→        '#boss-chat-editor-input',
   466→   466→   466→        '[contenteditable="true"]',
   467→   467→   467→    ]
   468→   468→   468→
   469→   469→   469→    input_element = None
   470→   470→   470→    for selector in input_selectors:
   471→   471→   471→        try:
   472→   472→   472→            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   473→   473→   473→            if element and await element.is_visible():
   474→   474→   474→                input_element = element
   475→   475→   475→                break
   476→   476→   476→        except Exception:
   477→   477→   477→            continue
   478→   478→   478→
   479→   479→   479→    if not input_element:
   480→   480→   480→        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")
   481→   481→   481→
   482→   482→   482→    # Click to focus
   483→   483→   483→    await input_element.click()
   484→   484→   484→    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   485→   485→   485→
   486→   486→   486→    # Clear any existing content
   487→   487→   487→    import sys
   488→   488→   488→    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   489→   489→   489→    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   490→   490→   490→    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
   491→   491→   491→    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)
   492→   492→   492→
   493→   493→   493→    # Type message
   494→   494→   494→    if len(message) > 50:
   495→   495→   495→        await input_element.fill(message)
   496→   496→   496→    else:
   497→   497→   497→        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)
   498→   498→   498→
   499→   499→   499→    await async_random_delay('action')
   500→   500→   500→
   501→   501→   501→    # Find and click send button
   502→   502→   502→    # Verified: div.submit contains text "发送"
   503→   503→   503→    send_selectors = [
   504→   504→   504→        'div.submit',
   505→   505→   505→        'text="发送"',
   506→   506→   506→        'button:has-text("发送")',
   507→   507→   507→    ]
   508→   508→   508→
   509→   509→   509→    for selector in send_selectors:
   510→   510→   510→        try:
   511→   511→   511→            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
   512→   512→   512→            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
   513→   513→   513→                await btn.click()
   514→   514→   514→                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   515→   515→   515→                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
   516→   516→   516→                return
   517→   517→   517→        except Exception:
   518→   518→   518→            continue
   519→   519→   519→
   520→   520→   520→    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
   521→   521→   521→    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
   522→   522→   522→    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   523→   523→   523→    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")
   524→   524→   524→
   525→   525→   525→
   526→   526→   526→def _save_message_to_db(
   527→   527→   527→    boss_id: str,
   528→   528→   528→    template_name: str,
   529→   529→   529→    content: str,
   530→   530→   530→    status: str,
   531→   531→   531→    db_manager,
   532→   532→   532→) -> None:
   533→   533→   533→    """Save a message record to the database."""
   534→   534→   534→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   535→   535→   535→        message = Message(
   536→   536→   536→            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
   537→   537→   537→            template_name=template_name,
   538→   538→   538→            content=content,
   539→   539→   539→            status=status,
   540→   540→   540→            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
   541→   541→   541→        )
   542→   542→   542→        session.add(message)
   543→   543→   543→

1→     1→     1→"""Configuration loader and manager."""
     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→import json
     4→     4→     4→from pathlib import Path
     5→     5→     5→from typing import Any, Dict
     6→     6→     6→
     7→     7→     7→from loguru import logger
     8→     8→     8→
     9→     9→     9→from src.exceptions.errors import ConfigurationError
    10→    10→    10→
    11→    11→    11→
    12→    12→    12→class Config:
    13→    13→    13→    """Configuration manager for Boss Assistant."""
    14→    14→    14→
    15→    15→    15→    def __init__(self, config_dir: str = None):
    16→    16→    16→        if config_dir is None:
    17→    17→    17→            # Use project root (where this source file lives) to find config/
    18→    18→    18→            config_dir = str(Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent / "config")
    19→    19→    19→        self.config_dir = Path(config_dir)
    20→    20→    20→        self._settings: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    21→    21→    21→        self._selectors: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    22→    22→    22→        self._message_templates: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    23→    23→    23→
    24→    24→    24→        self._load_all()
    25→    25→    25→
    26→    26→    26→    def _load_json(self, filename: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    27→    27→    27→        filepath = self.config_dir / filename
    28→    28→    28→        try:
    29→    29→    29→            with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    30→    30→    30→                return json.load(f)
    31→    31→    31→        except FileNotFoundError:
    32→    32→    32→            raise ConfigurationError(f"Configuration file not found: {filepath}")
    33→    33→    33→        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
    34→    34→    34→            raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid JSON in {filepath}: {e}")
    35→    35→    35→
    36→    36→    36→    def _load_all(self):
    37→    37→    37→        logger.info("Loading configuration files...")
    38→    38→    38→        self._settings = self._load_json("settings.json")
    39→    39→    39→        self._selectors = self._load_json("selectors.json")
    40→    40→    40→        self._message_templates = self._load_json("message_templates.json")
    41→    41→    41→        logger.info("Configuration loaded successfully")
    42→    42→    42→
    43→    43→    43→    _MISSING = object()
    44→    44→    44→
    45→    45→    45→    def get(self, key: str, default: Any = None) -> Any:
    46→    46→    46→        """Get setting by dot-notation key.
    47→    47→    47→
    48→    48→    48→        Distinguishes between a key not found and a key explicitly set to null.
    49→    49→    49→        """
    50→    50→    50→        keys = key.split('.')
    51→    51→    51→        value = self._settings
    52→    52→    52→
    53→    53→    53→        for k in keys:
    54→    54→    54→            if isinstance(value, dict):
    55→    55→    55→                value = value.get(k, self._MISSING)
    56→    56→    56→                if value is self._MISSING:
    57→    57→    57→                    return default
    58→    58→    58→            else:
    59→    59→    59→                return default
    60→    60→    60→
    61→    61→    61→        return value
    62→    62→    62→
    63→    63→    63→    def get_selector(self, selector_path: str) -> str:
    64→    64→    64→        """Get selector by dot-notation path."""
    65→    65→    65→        keys = selector_path.split('.')
    66→    66→    66→        value = self._selectors.get('selectors', {})
    67→    67→    67→
    68→    68→    68→        for k in keys:
    69→    69→    69→            if isinstance(value, dict):
    70→    70→    70→                value = value.get(k)
    71→    71→    71→                if value is None:
    72→    72→    72→                    raise ConfigurationError(f"Selector not found: {selector_path}")
    73→    73→    73→            else:
    74→    74→    74→                raise ConfigurationError(f"Invalid selector path: {selector_path}")
    75→    75→    75→
    76→    76→    76→        return value
    77→    77→    77→
    78→    78→    78→    def get_template(self, template_name: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    79→    79→    79→        template = self._message_templates.get(template_name)
    80→    80→    80→        if template is None:
    81→    81→    81→            raise ConfigurationError(f"Message template not found: {template_name}")
    82→    82→    82→        return template
    83→    83→    83→
    84→    84→    84→    def list_templates(self) -> list:
    85→    85→    85→        return list(self._message_templates.keys())
    86→    86→    86→
    87→    87→    87→
    88→    88→    88→_config_instance = None
    89→    89→    89→
    90→    90→    90→
    91→    91→    91→def get_config() -> Config:
    92→    92→    92→    global _config_instance
    93→    93→    93→    if _config_instance is None:
    94→    94→    94→        _config_instance = Config()
    95→    95→    95→    return _config_instance
    96→    96→    96→
    97→    97→    97→
    98→    98→    98→def reset_config() -> None:
    99→    99→    99→    """Reset global config instance (for testing)."""
   100→   100→   100→    global _config_instance
   101→   101→   101→    _config_instance = None
   102→   102→   102→

1→     1→     1→"""Retry utilities for navigation and network operations."""
     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→from tenacity import retry, stop_after_attempt, wait_exponential, retry_if_exception_type
     4→     4→     4→from patchright.async_api import Page, Error as PlaywrightError
     5→     5→     5→from loguru import logger
     6→     6→     6→
     7→     7→     7→
     8→     8→     8→@retry(
     9→     9→     9→    stop=stop_after_attempt(3),
    10→    10→    10→    wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10),
    11→    11→    11→    retry=retry_if_exception_type((PlaywrightError, TimeoutError, ConnectionError)),
    12→    12→    12→    before_sleep=lambda retry_state: logger.warning(
    13→    13→    13→        f"Navigation failed (attempt {retry_state.attempt_number}), retrying..."
    14→    14→    14→    ),
    15→    15→    15→    reraise=True,
    16→    16→    16→)
    17→    17→    17→async def retry_navigation(page: Page, url: str, **kwargs) -> None:
    18→    18→    18→    """Navigate to a URL with automatic retry on failure.
    19→    19→    19→
    20→    20→    20→    Args:
    21→    21→    21→        page: Playwright page instance
    22→    22→    22→        url: URL to navigate to
    23→    23→    23→        **kwargs: Additional arguments passed to page.goto()
    24→    24→    24→    """
    25→    25→    25→    await page.goto(url, **kwargs)
    26→    26→    26→

1→     1→     1→"""Rate limiter for preventing account bans."""
     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→import asyncio
     4→     4→     4→from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
     5→     5→     5→from typing import Tuple, Optional
     6→     6→     6→
     7→     7→     7→from loguru import logger
     8→     8→     8→from sqlalchemy import func
     9→     9→     9→
    10→    10→    10→from src.models.database import ActionLog, get_db_manager, DatabaseManager
    11→    11→    11→from src.utils.config import get_config, Config
    12→    12→    12→from src.exceptions.errors import RateLimitExceededError
    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→
    15→    15→    15→class RateLimiter:
    16→    16→    16→    """Rate limiter for controlling action frequency.
    17→    17→    17→
    18→    18→    18→    Supports adaptive throttling: when captchas or errors are reported,
    19→    19→    19→    limits are temporarily tightened to reduce detection risk.
    20→    20→    20→    """
    21→    21→    21→
    22→    22→    22→    def __init__(self, config: Optional[Config] = None, db_manager: Optional[DatabaseManager] = None):
    23→    23→    23→        self.config = config or get_config()
    24→    24→    24→        self.db_manager = db_manager or get_db_manager()
    25→    25→    25→
    26→    26→    26→        self._throttle_factor: float = 1.0
    27→    27→    27→        self._captcha_timestamps: list = []
    28→    28→    28→        self._error_timestamps: list = []
    29→    29→    29→        self._pruned: bool = False
    30→    30→    30→
    31→    31→    31→    def report_captcha(self) -> None:
    32→    32→    32→        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    33→    33→    33→        self._captcha_timestamps.append(now)
    34→    34→    34→        cutoff = now - timedelta(minutes=30)
    35→    35→    35→        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    36→    36→    36→        self._update_throttle_factor()
    37→    37→    37→
    38→    38→    38→    def report_error(self) -> None:
    39→    39→    39→        """Report an error to adaptive throttling (e.g. page load failure, selector not found)."""
    40→    40→    40→        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    41→    41→    41→        self._error_timestamps.append(now)
    42→    42→    42→        cutoff = now - timedelta(minutes=30)
    43→    43→    43→        self._error_timestamps = [t for t in self._error_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    44→    44→    44→        self._update_throttle_factor()
    45→    45→    45→
    46→    46→    46→    def _update_throttle_factor(self) -> None:
    47→    47→    47→        captcha_count = len(self._captcha_timestamps)
    48→    48→    48→        error_count = len(self._error_timestamps)
    49→    49→    49→        combined = captcha_count + error_count * 0.5
    50→    50→    50→
    51→    51→    51→        if combined >= 3:
    52→    52→    52→            self._throttle_factor = 0.3
    53→    53→    53→        elif combined >= 2:
    54→    54→    54→            self._throttle_factor = 0.5
    55→    55→    55→        elif combined >= 1:
    56→    56→    56→            self._throttle_factor = 0.7
    57→    57→    57→        else:
    58→    58→    58→            self._throttle_factor = 1.0
    59→    59→    59→
    60→    60→    60→        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
    61→    61→    61→            logger.warning(
    62→    62→    62→                f"Adaptive throttle active: factor={self._throttle_factor:.1f} "
    63→    63→    63→                f"(captchas={captcha_count}, errors={error_count} in last 30min)"
    64→    64→    64→            )
    65→    65→    65→
    66→    66→    66→    def _refresh_throttle(self) -> None:
    67→    67→    67→        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(minutes=30)
    68→    68→    68→        self._captcha_timestamps = [t for t in self._captcha_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    69→    69→    69→        self._error_timestamps = [t for t in self._error_timestamps if t >= cutoff]
    70→    70→    70→        self._update_throttle_factor()
    71→    71→    71→
    72→    72→    72→    @property
    73→    73→    73→    def throttle_factor(self) -> float:
    74→    74→    74→        return self._throttle_factor
    75→    75→    75→
    76→    76→    76→    def _get_limits(self, action_type: str) -> Tuple[int, int, int]:
    77→    77→    77→        action_map = {
    78→    78→    78→            'search': ('search_per_hour', 'search_per_day'),
    79→    79→    79→            'view_profile': ('profile_view_per_hour', 'profile_view_per_day'),
    80→    80→    80→            'send_message': ('message_per_hour', 'message_per_day'),
    81→    81→    81→        }
    82→    82→    82→
    83→    83→    83→        if action_type not in action_map:
    84→    84→    84→            raise ValueError(f"Unknown action type: {action_type}")
    85→    85→    85→
    86→    86→    86→        hour_key, day_key = action_map[action_type]
    87→    87→    87→
    88→    88→    88→        per_hour = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{hour_key}', 20)
    89→    89→    89→        per_day = self.config.get(f'rate_limits.{day_key}', 100)
    90→    90→    90→        min_interval = self.config.get('rate_limits.min_interval_seconds', 35)
    91→    91→    91→
    92→    92→    92→        per_hour = max(1, int(per_hour * self._throttle_factor))
    93→    93→    93→        per_day = max(1, int(per_day * self._throttle_factor))
    94→    94→    94→        if self._throttle_factor < 1.0:
    95→    95→    95→            min_interval = int(min_interval / self._throttle_factor)
    96→    96→    96→
    97→    97→    97→        return per_hour, per_day, min_interval
    98→    98→    98→
    99→    99→    99→    def _count_actions(self, action_type: str, since: datetime) -> int:
   100→   100→   100→        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   101→   101→   101→            count = session.query(func.count(ActionLog.id)).filter(
   102→   102→   102→                ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   103→   103→   103→                ActionLog.timestamp >= since
   104→   104→   104→            ).scalar()
   105→   105→   105→            return count or 0
   106→   106→   106→
   107→   107→   107→    @staticmethod
   108→   108→   108→    def _ensure_aware(dt: Optional[datetime]) -> Optional[datetime]:
   109→   109→   109→        """Ensure a datetime from SQLite is timezone-aware (UTC)."""
   110→   110→   110→        if dt is None:
   111→   111→   111→            return None
   112→   112→   112→        if dt.tzinfo is None:
   113→   113→   113→            return dt.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
   114→   114→   114→        return dt
   115→   115→   115→
   116→   116→   116→    def _get_last_action_time(self, action_type: Optional[str] = None) -> Optional[datetime]:
   117→   117→   117→        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   118→   118→   118→            query = session.query(func.max(ActionLog.timestamp))
   119→   119→   119→            if action_type:
   120→   120→   120→                query = query.filter(ActionLog.action_type == action_type)
   121→   121→   121→            last_time = query.scalar()
   122→   122→   122→            return self._ensure_aware(last_time)
   123→   123→   123→
   124→   124→   124→    def check_rate_limit(self, action_type: str) -> None:
   125→   125→   125→        if not self._pruned:
   126→   126→   126→            self.prune_old_entries()
   127→   127→   127→            self._pruned = True
   128→   128→   128→
   129→   129→   129→        self._refresh_throttle()
   130→   130→   130→        per_hour, per_day, min_interval = self._get_limits(action_type)
   131→   131→   131→
   132→   132→   132→        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   133→   133→   133→        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   134→   134→   134→        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   135→   135→   135→
   136→   136→   136→        hourly_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   137→   137→   137→        if hourly_count >= per_hour:
   138→   138→   138→            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   139→   139→   139→                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   140→   140→   140→                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   141→   141→   141→                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_hour_ago
   142→   142→   142→                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   143→   143→   143→
   144→   144→   144→                if oldest_in_window:
   145→   145→   145→                    oldest_ts = self._ensure_aware(oldest_in_window[0])
   146→   146→   146→                    wait_until = oldest_ts + timedelta(hours=1)
   147→   147→   147→                    wait_seconds = max(1, int((wait_until - now).total_seconds()))
   148→   148→   148→                else:
   149→   149→   149→                    wait_seconds = 3600
   150→   150→   150→
   151→   151→   151→            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   152→   152→   152→                action_type=action_type,
   153→   153→   153→                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   154→   154→   154→                message=f"Hourly rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   155→   155→   155→                        f"Limit: {per_hour}/hour. Wait {wait_seconds // 60} minutes."
   156→   156→   156→            )
   157→   157→   157→
   158→   158→   158→        daily_count = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   159→   159→   159→        if daily_count >= per_day:
   160→   160→   160→            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   161→   161→   161→                oldest_in_window = session.query(ActionLog.timestamp).filter(
   162→   162→   162→                    ActionLog.action_type == action_type,
   163→   163→   163→                    ActionLog.timestamp >= one_day_ago
   164→   164→   164→                ).order_by(ActionLog.timestamp.asc()).first()
   165→   165→   165→
   166→   166→   166→                if oldest_in_window:
   167→   167→   167→                    oldest_ts = self._ensure_aware(oldest_in_window[0])
   168→   168→   168→                    wait_until = oldest_ts + timedelta(days=1)
   169→   169→   169→                    wait_seconds = max(1, int((wait_until - now).total_seconds()))
   170→   170→   170→                else:
   171→   171→   171→                    wait_seconds = 86400
   172→   172→   172→
   173→   173→   173→            raise RateLimitExceededError(
   174→   174→   174→                action_type=action_type,
   175→   175→   175→                wait_time=wait_seconds,
   176→   176→   176→                message=f"Daily rate limit exceeded for {action_type}. "
   177→   177→   177→                        f"Limit: {per_day}/day. Wait {wait_seconds // 3600} hours."
   178→   178→   178→            )
   179→   179→   179→
   180→   180→   180→        last_action = self._get_last_action_time(action_type=action_type)
   181→   181→   181→        if last_action:
   182→   182→   182→            elapsed = (now - last_action).total_seconds()
   183→   183→   183→            if elapsed < min_interval:
   184→   184→   184→                wait_seconds = max(1, int(min_interval - elapsed))
   185→   185→   185→                raise RateLimitExceededError(
   186→   186→   186→                    action_type=action_type,
   187→   187→   187→                    wait_time=wait_seconds,
   188→   188→   188→                    message=f"Minimum interval not met for {action_type}. Wait {wait_seconds} seconds."
   189→   189→   189→                )
   190→   190→   190→
   191→   191→   191→        logger.debug(f"Rate limit check passed for {action_type}")
   192→   192→   192→
   193→   193→   193→    def log_action(self, action_type: str, details: Optional[dict] = None) -> None:
   194→   194→   194→        with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   195→   195→   195→            action_log = ActionLog(
   196→   196→   196→                action_type=action_type,
   197→   197→   197→                timestamp=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
   198→   198→   198→                details=details or {}
   199→   199→   199→            )
   200→   200→   200→            session.add(action_log)
   201→   201→   201→        logger.debug(f"Logged action: {action_type}")
   202→   202→   202→
   203→   203→   203→    def prune_old_entries(self, retention_hours: int = 48) -> int:
   204→   204→   204→        cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(hours=retention_hours)
   205→   205→   205→        try:
   206→   206→   206→            with self.db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   207→   207→   207→                count = session.query(ActionLog).filter(
   208→   208→   208→                    ActionLog.timestamp < cutoff
   209→   209→   209→                ).delete()
   210→   210→   210→                logger.debug(f"Pruned {count} old ActionLog entries (older than {retention_hours}h)")
   211→   211→   211→                return count
   212→   212→   212→        except Exception as e:
   213→   213→   213→            logger.error(f"Failed to prune ActionLog entries: {e}")
   214→   214→   214→            return 0
   215→   215→   215→
   216→   216→   216→    def get_quota_status(self, action_type: str) -> dict:
   217→   217→   217→        per_hour, per_day, _ = self._get_limits(action_type)
   218→   218→   218→
   219→   219→   219→        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   220→   220→   220→        one_hour_ago = now - timedelta(hours=1)
   221→   221→   221→        one_day_ago = now - timedelta(days=1)
   222→   222→   222→
   223→   223→   223→        hourly_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_hour_ago)
   224→   224→   224→        daily_used = self._count_actions(action_type, one_day_ago)
   225→   225→   225→
   226→   226→   226→        return {
   227→   227→   227→            'action_type': action_type,
   228→   228→   228→            'hourly': {
   229→   229→   229→                'used': hourly_used,
   230→   230→   230→                'limit': per_hour,
   231→   231→   231→                'remaining': max(0, per_hour - hourly_used)
   232→   232→   232→            },
   233→   233→   233→            'daily': {
   234→   234→   234→                'used': daily_used,
   235→   235→   235→                'limit': per_day,
   236→   236→   236→                'remaining': max(0, per_day - daily_used)
   237→   237→   237→            }
   238→   238→   238→        }
   239→   239→   239→
   240→   240→   240→
   241→   241→   241→async def async_check_rate_limit(
   242→   242→   242→    action_type: str,
   243→   243→   243→    max_retries: int = 60,
   244→   244→   244→    max_total_wait: int = 1800,
   245→   245→   245→) -> None:
   246→   246→   246→    """Check rate limit, waiting through violations until the action is allowed.
   247→   247→   247→
   248→   248→   248→    Raises RateLimitExceededError if still blocked after max_retries attempts
   249→   249→   249→    or max_total_wait seconds (prevents hanging for hours on daily limits).
   250→   250→   250→    """
   251→   251→   251→    import time
   252→   252→   252→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   253→   253→   253→    start = time.monotonic()
   254→   254→   254→    for attempt in range(max_retries):
   255→   255→   255→        try:
   256→   256→   256→            rate_limiter.check_rate_limit(action_type)
   257→   257→   257→            return
   258→   258→   258→        except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   259→   259→   259→            elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
   260→   260→   260→            if attempt >= max_retries - 1 or elapsed + e.wait_time > max_total_wait:
   261→   261→   261→                raise
   262→   262→   262→            wait = e.wait_time + 1  # +1s buffer
   263→   263→   263→            logger.info(
   264→   264→   264→                f"Rate limit hit: {e}. Waiting {wait}s before retrying "
   265→   265→   265→                f"(attempt {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}, elapsed {elapsed:.0f}s)..."
   266→   266→   266→            )
   267→   267→   267→            await asyncio.sleep(wait)
   268→   268→   268→
   269→   269→   269→
   270→   270→   270→_rate_limiter = None
   271→   271→   271→
   272→   272→   272→
   273→   273→   273→def get_rate_limiter() -> RateLimiter:
   274→   274→   274→    global _rate_limiter
   275→   275→   275→    if _rate_limiter is None:
   276→   276→   276→        _rate_limiter = RateLimiter()
   277→   277→   277→    return _rate_limiter
   278→   278→   278→
   279→   279→   279→
   280→   280→   280→def reset_rate_limiter() -> None:
   281→   281→   281→    """Reset global rate limiter instance (for testing)."""
   282→   282→   282→    global _rate_limiter
   283→   283→   283→    _rate_limiter = None
   284→   284→   284→
