1→     1→     1→     1→"""Profile extraction module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→Extracts candidate profile information from Boss直聘.
     4→     4→     4→     4→
     5→     5→     5→     5→CRITICAL LIMITATION (verified 2026-03-03):
     6→     6→     6→     6→Profile details in the resume overlay are wasm-rendered — the DOM inside
     7→     7→     7→     7→.resume-detail-wrap is empty. We CANNOT extract detailed resume via DOM.
     8→     8→     8→     8→
     9→     9→     9→     9→Profile data sources:
    10→    10→    10→    10→1. Search card data (from searchFrame iframe) — best source for basic info
    11→    11→    11→    11→2. Resume overlay header/footer — job position, contact status
    12→    12→    12→    12→3. Chat page conversation — limited info
    13→    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→    14→The extract_profile function now primarily uses search card data
    15→    15→    15→    15→and supplements with whatever is available from the resume overlay.
    16→    16→    16→    16→"""
    17→    17→    17→    17→
    18→    18→    18→    18→from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
    19→    19→    19→    19→
    20→    20→    20→    20→from patchright.async_api import Page, Frame
    21→    21→    21→    21→from loguru import logger
    22→    22→    22→    22→from rich.console import Console
    23→    23→    23→    23→from rich.panel import Panel
    24→    24→    24→    24→
    25→    25→    25→    25→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    26→    26→    26→    26→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    27→    27→    27→    27→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    28→    28→    28→    28→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    29→    29→    29→    29→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    30→    30→    30→    30→from src.models.database import Candidate, get_db_manager
    31→    31→    31→    31→from src.exceptions.errors import ExtractionError
    32→    32→    32→    32→
    33→    33→    33→    33→console = Console()
    34→    34→    34→    34→
    35→    35→    35→    35→
    36→    36→    36→    36→# JavaScript extraction for candidate profile from search card (inside searchFrame iframe).
    37→    37→    37→    37→# This extracts all available data from the card since resume detail is wasm-rendered.
    38→    38→    38→    38→EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS = """
    39→    39→    39→    39→(expectId) => {
    40→    40→    40→    40→    const link = document.querySelector('a[data-expect="' + expectId + '"]');
    41→    41→    41→    41→    if (!link) return null;
    42→    42→    42→    42→
    43→    43→    43→    43→    const card = link.closest('.geek-info-card');
    44→    44→    44→    44→    if (!card) return null;
    45→    45→    45→    45→
    46→    46→    46→    46→    const result = {
    47→    47→    47→    47→        name: '',
    48→    48→    48→    48→        title: '',
    49→    49→    49→    49→        company: '',
    50→    50→    50→    50→        location: '',
    51→    51→    51→    51→        salary_expect: '',
    52→    52→    52→    52→        work_years: '',
    53→    53→    53→    53→        education_level: '',
    54→    54→    54→    54→        basic_info: {},
    55→    55→    55→    55→        education: [],
    56→    56→    56→    56→        work_experience: [],
    57→    57→    57→    57→        skills: []
    58→    58→    58→    58→    };
    59→    59→    59→    59→
    60→    60→    60→    60→    // Name
    61→    61→    61→    61→    const nameEl = card.querySelector('.name-label');
    62→    62→    62→    62→    result.name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
    63→    63→    63→    63→
    64→    64→    64→    64→    // Info labels: age, work years, education, job status, salary
    65→    65→    65→    65→    const infoLabels = card.querySelectorAll('.info-labels > .label-text');
    66→    66→    66→    66→    const infoTexts = Array.from(infoLabels).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
    67→    67→    67→    67→
    68→    68→    68→    68→    for (const text of infoTexts) {
    69→    69→    69→    69→        if (text.includes('岁')) {
    70→    70→    70→    70→            result.basic_info.age = text;
    71→    71→    71→    71→        } else if (text.includes('年') && !text.includes('岁')) {
    72→    72→    72→    72→            result.work_years = text;
    73→    73→    73→    73→            result.basic_info.work_years = text;
    74→    74→    74→    74→        } else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => text.includes(d))) {
    75→    75→    75→    75→            result.education_level = text;
    76→    76→    76→    76→            result.basic_info.education = text;
    77→    77→    77→    77→        } else if (text.includes('在职') || text.includes('离职') || text.includes('求职')) {
    78→    78→    78→    78→            result.basic_info.job_status = text;
    79→    79→    79→    79→        } else if (text.includes('K') || text.includes('k')) {
    80→    80→    80→    80→            result.salary_expect = text;
    81→    81→    81→    81→        }
    82→    82→    82→    82→    }
    83→    83→    83→    83→
    84→    84→    84→    84→    // Active status
    85→    85→    85→    85→    const activeEl = card.querySelector('.active-desc-text');
    86→    86→    86→    86→    if (activeEl) result.basic_info.active_status = activeEl.innerText.trim();
    87→    87→    87→    87→
    88→    88→    88→    88→    // Labels (e.g. "热搜")
    89→    89→    89→    89→    const labelEls = card.querySelectorAll('.card-label');
    90→    90→    90→    90→    result.basic_info.labels = Array.from(labelEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    91→    91→    91→    91→
    92→    92→    92→    92→    // Self description
    93→    93→    93→    93→    const detailEl = card.querySelector('.info-detail');
    94→    94→    94→    94→    if (detailEl) result.basic_info.self_description = detailEl.innerText.trim();
    95→    95→    95→    95→
    96→    96→    96→    96→    // Expect city
    97→    97→    97→    97→    const expectCityEls = card.querySelectorAll('.expect-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
    98→    98→    98→    98→    result.location = Array.from(expectCityEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(' ');
    99→    99→    99→    99→
   100→   100→   100→   100→    // Work experience
   101→   101→   101→   101→    const workExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.work-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   102→   102→   102→   102→    const workTexts = Array.from(workExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   103→   103→   103→   103→    if (workTexts.length >= 1) {
   104→   104→   104→   104→        result.company = workTexts[0];
   105→   105→   105→   105→        result.title = workTexts[1] || '';
   106→   106→   106→   106→        result.work_experience.push({
   107→   107→   107→   107→            company: workTexts[0],
   108→   108→   108→   108→            title: workTexts[1] || ''
   109→   109→   109→   109→        });
   110→   110→   110→   110→    }
   111→   111→   111→   111→
   112→   112→   112→   112→    // Education
   113→   113→   113→   113→    const eduEls = card.querySelectorAll('.edu-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   114→   114→   114→   114→    const eduTexts = Array.from(eduEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   115→   115→   115→   115→    if (eduTexts.length >= 1) {
   116→   116→   116→   116→        result.education.push({
   117→   117→   117→   117→            school: eduTexts[0],
   118→   118→   118→   118→            major: eduTexts[1] || ''
   119→   119→   119→   119→        });
   120→   120→   120→   120→    }
   121→   121→   121→   121→
   122→   122→   122→   122→    // Elite flag
   123→   123→   123→   123→    result.basic_info.is_elite = link.dataset.elitegeek === '1';
   124→   124→   124→   124→
   125→   125→   125→   125→    return result;
   126→   126→   126→   126→}
   127→   127→   127→   127→"""
   128→   128→   128→   128→
   129→   129→   129→   129→
   130→   130→   130→   130→# JavaScript extraction for resume overlay (main page DOM).
   131→   131→   131→   131→# Limited data since resume content is wasm-rendered.
   132→   132→   132→   132→EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS = """
   133→   133→   133→   133→() => {
   134→   134→   134→   134→    const dialog = document.querySelector('.dialog-wrap.active .dialog-lib-resume');
   135→   135→   135→   135→    if (!dialog) return null;
   136→   136→   136→   136→
   137→   137→   137→   137→    const result = {};
   138→   138→   138→   138→
   139→   139→   139→   139→    // Position info from footer
   140→   140→   140→   140→    const positionEl = dialog.querySelector('.position-name');
   141→   141→   141→   141→    if (positionEl) result.chat_position = positionEl.innerText.trim();
   142→   142→   142→   142→
   143→   143→   143→   143→    // Chat history from right panel
   144→   144→   144→   144→    const historyEls = dialog.querySelectorAll('.chat-history-process .action');
   145→   145→   145→   145→    result.chat_history = Array.from(historyEls).slice(0, 5).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
   146→   146→   146→   146→
   147→   147→   147→   147→    // Contact button text
   148→   148→   148→   148→    const contactBtn = dialog.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   149→   149→   149→   149→    if (contactBtn) result.contact_status = contactBtn.innerText.trim();
   150→   150→   150→   150→
   151→   151→   151→   151→    return result;
   152→   152→   152→   152→}
   153→   153→   153→   153→"""
   154→   154→   154→   154→
   155→   155→   155→   155→
   156→   156→   156→   156→async def extract_profile(
   157→   157→   157→   157→    boss_id: str,
   158→   158→   158→   158→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   159→   159→   159→   159→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   160→   160→   160→   160→    """
   161→   161→   161→   161→    Extract detailed profile for a candidate.
   162→   162→   162→   162→
   163→   163→   163→   163→    Uses search card data as the primary source since the resume
   164→   164→   164→   164→    overlay is wasm-rendered and has empty DOM.
   165→   165→   165→   165→
   166→   166→   166→   166→    Args:
   167→   167→   167→   167→        boss_id: Boss直聘 candidate ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
   168→   168→   168→   168→        browser: Browser manager instance
   169→   169→   169→   169→
   170→   170→   170→   170→    Returns:
   171→   171→   171→   171→        Dictionary with profile data
   172→   172→   172→   172→
   173→   173→   173→   173→    Raises:
   174→   174→   174→   174→        ExtractionError: If profile extraction fails
   175→   175→   175→   175→    """
   176→   176→   176→   176→    if browser is None:
   177→   177→   177→   177→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   178→   178→   178→   178→
   179→   179→   179→   179→    page = browser.page
   180→   180→   180→   180→    if not page:
   181→   181→   181→   181→        page = await browser.start()
   182→   182→   182→   182→
   183→   183→   183→   183→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   184→   184→   184→   184→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   185→   185→   185→   185→
   186→   186→   186→   186→    # Rate limit check
   187→   187→   187→   187→    await async_check_rate_limit('view_profile')
   188→   188→   188→   188→
   189→   189→   189→   189→    expect_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   190→   190→   190→   190→
   191→   191→   191→   191→    try:
   192→   192→   192→   192→        profile_data = None
   193→   193→   193→   193→
   194→   194→   194→   194→        # Strategy 1: Extract from search card in iframe (best source)
   195→   195→   195→   195→        search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   196→   196→   196→   196→        if not search_frame:
   197→   197→   197→   197→            for f in page.frames:
   198→   198→   198→   198→                if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   199→   199→   199→   199→                    search_frame = f
   200→   200→   200→   200→                    break
   201→   201→   201→   201→
   202→   202→   202→   202→        if search_frame:
   203→   203→   203→   203→            profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   204→   204→   204→   204→
   205→   205→   205→   205→        # Strategy 2: If not on search page, navigate there
   206→   206→   206→   206→        if not profile_data:
   207→   207→   207→   207→            await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search',
   208→   208→   208→   208→                                   wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   209→   209→   209→   209→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   210→   210→   210→   210→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   211→   211→   211→   211→
   212→   212→   212→   212→            search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   213→   213→   213→   213→            if not search_frame:
   214→   214→   214→   214→                for f in page.frames:
   215→   215→   215→   215→                    if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   216→   216→   216→   216→                        search_frame = f
   217→   217→   217→   217→                        break
   218→   218→   218→   218→
   219→   219→   219→   219→            if search_frame:
   220→   220→   220→   220→                profile_data = await search_frame.evaluate(EXTRACT_PROFILE_FROM_CARD_JS, expect_id)
   221→   221→   221→   221→
   222→   222→   222→   222→        # Strategy 3: Use database data as fallback
   223→   223→   223→   223→        if not profile_data:
   224→   224→   224→   224→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   225→   225→   225→   225→                candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   226→   226→   226→   226→                if candidate:
   227→   227→   227→   227→                    profile_data = {
   228→   228→   228→   228→                        'name': candidate.name or '',
   229→   229→   229→   229→                        'title': candidate.title or '',
   230→   230→   230→   230→                        'company': candidate.company or '',
   231→   231→   231→   231→                        'location': candidate.location or '',
   232→   232→   232→   232→                        'salary_expect': candidate.salary_expect or '',
   233→   233→   233→   233→                        'work_years': candidate.work_years or '',
   234→   234→   234→   234→                        'education_level': candidate.education_level or '',
   235→   235→   235→   235→                        'basic_info': candidate.basic_info or {},
   236→   236→   236→   236→                        'education': candidate.education or [],
   237→   237→   237→   237→                        'work_experience': candidate.work_experience or [],
   238→   238→   238→   238→                        'skills': candidate.skills or [],
   239→   239→   239→   239→                    }
   240→   240→   240→   240→
   241→   241→   241→   241→        if not profile_data:
   242→   242→   242→   242→            raise ExtractionError(f"No profile data found for {boss_id}")
   243→   243→   243→   243→
   244→   244→   244→   244→        # Try to supplement with overlay data (if resume dialog is open)
   245→   245→   245→   245→        try:
   246→   246→   246→   246→            overlay_data = await page.evaluate(EXTRACT_OVERLAY_JS)
   247→   247→   247→   247→            if overlay_data:
   248→   248→   248→   248→                profile_data.setdefault('basic_info', {})
   249→   249→   249→   249→                if overlay_data.get('chat_position'):
   250→   250→   250→   250→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_position'] = overlay_data['chat_position']
   251→   251→   251→   251→                if overlay_data.get('contact_status'):
   252→   252→   252→   252→                    profile_data['basic_info']['contact_status'] = overlay_data['contact_status']
   253→   253→   253→   253→                if overlay_data.get('chat_history'):
   254→   254→   254→   254→                    profile_data['basic_info']['chat_history'] = overlay_data['chat_history']
   255→   255→   255→   255→        except Exception:
   256→   256→   256→   256→            pass  # Overlay data is supplementary, not critical
   257→   257→   257→   257→
   258→   258→   258→   258→        # Log action
   259→   259→   259→   259→        rate_limiter.log_action('view_profile', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   260→   260→   260→   260→
   261→   261→   261→   261→        # Update database
   262→   262→   262→   262→        _update_profile_in_db(boss_id, profile_data, db_manager)
   263→   263→   263→   263→
   264→   264→   264→   264→        # Display profile
   265→   265→   265→   265→        _display_profile(boss_id, profile_data)
   266→   266→   266→   266→
   267→   267→   267→   267→        return profile_data
   268→   268→   268→   268→
   269→   269→   269→   269→    except ExtractionError:
   270→   270→   270→   270→        raise
   271→   271→   271→   271→    except Exception as e:
   272→   272→   272→   272→        logger.error(f"Error extracting profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   273→   273→   273→   273→        raise ExtractionError(f"Failed to extract profile for {boss_id}: {e}")
   274→   274→   274→   274→
   275→   275→   275→   275→
   276→   276→   276→   276→def _update_profile_in_db(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict, db_manager) -> None:
   277→   277→   277→   277→    """Update candidate profile in the database."""
   278→   278→   278→   278→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   279→   279→   279→   279→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   280→   280→   280→   280→
   281→   281→   281→   281→        if not candidate:
   282→   282→   282→   282→            candidate = Candidate(boss_id=boss_id)
   283→   283→   283→   283→            session.add(candidate)
   284→   284→   284→   284→
   285→   285→   285→   285→        # Update fields
   286→   286→   286→   286→        candidate.name = profile_data.get('name') or candidate.name
   287→   287→   287→   287→        candidate.title = profile_data.get('title') or candidate.title
   288→   288→   288→   288→        candidate.company = profile_data.get('company') or candidate.company
   289→   289→   289→   289→        candidate.location = profile_data.get('location') or candidate.location
   290→   290→   290→   290→        candidate.salary_expect = profile_data.get('salary_expect') or candidate.salary_expect
   291→   291→   291→   291→        candidate.work_years = profile_data.get('work_years') or candidate.work_years
   292→   292→   292→   292→        candidate.education_level = profile_data.get('education_level') or candidate.education_level
   293→   293→   293→   293→        candidate.basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info')
   294→   294→   294→   294→        candidate.education = profile_data.get('education')
   295→   295→   295→   295→        candidate.work_experience = profile_data.get('work_experience')
   296→   296→   296→   296→        candidate.skills = profile_data.get('skills')
   297→   297→   297→   297→
   298→   298→   298→   298→
   299→   299→   299→   299→def _display_profile(boss_id: str, profile_data: Dict) -> None:
   300→   300→   300→   300→    """Display extracted profile in Rich format."""
   301→   301→   301→   301→    name = profile_data.get('name', 'Unknown')
   302→   302→   302→   302→    title = profile_data.get('title', '')
   303→   303→   303→   303→    company = profile_data.get('company', '')
   304→   304→   304→   304→    location = profile_data.get('location', '')
   305→   305→   305→   305→    salary = profile_data.get('salary_expect', '')
   306→   306→   306→   306→    work_years = profile_data.get('work_years', '')
   307→   307→   307→   307→    education_level = profile_data.get('education_level', '')
   308→   308→   308→   308→
   309→   309→   309→   309→    # Header
   310→   310→   310→   310→    header = f"[bold]{name}[/bold]"
   311→   311→   311→   311→    if title:
   312→   312→   312→   312→        header += f" - {title}"
   313→   313→   313→   313→    if company:
   314→   314→   314→   314→        header += f" @ {company}"
   315→   315→   315→   315→
   316→   316→   316→   316→    console.print(Panel(header, title=f"Profile: {boss_id}", border_style="green"))
   317→   317→   317→   317→
   318→   318→   318→   318→    # Basic info
   319→   319→   319→   319→    info_parts = []
   320→   320→   320→   320→    if location:
   321→   321→   321→   321→        info_parts.append(f"Location: {location}")
   322→   322→   322→   322→    if salary:
   323→   323→   323→   323→        info_parts.append(f"Expected Salary: {salary}")
   324→   324→   324→   324→    if work_years:
   325→   325→   325→   325→        info_parts.append(f"Experience: {work_years}")
   326→   326→   326→   326→    if education_level:
   327→   327→   327→   327→        info_parts.append(f"Education: {education_level}")
   328→   328→   328→   328→
   329→   329→   329→   329→    basic_info = profile_data.get('basic_info', {})
   330→   330→   330→   330→    if basic_info.get('age'):
   331→   331→   331→   331→        info_parts.append(f"Age: {basic_info['age']}")
   332→   332→   332→   332→    if basic_info.get('job_status'):
   333→   333→   333→   333→        info_parts.append(f"Status: {basic_info['job_status']}")
   334→   334→   334→   334→    if basic_info.get('active_status'):
   335→   335→   335→   335→        info_parts.append(f"Active: {basic_info['active_status']}")
   336→   336→   336→   336→
   337→   337→   337→   337→    if info_parts:
   338→   338→   338→   338→        console.print("  " + " | ".join(info_parts))
   339→   339→   339→   339→
   340→   340→   340→   340→    # Education
   341→   341→   341→   341→    education = profile_data.get('education', [])
   342→   342→   342→   342→    if education:
   343→   343→   343→   343→        console.print("\n  [cyan]Education:[/cyan]")
   344→   344→   344→   344→        for edu in education:
   345→   345→   345→   345→            parts = []
   346→   346→   346→   346→            if edu.get('school'):
   347→   347→   347→   347→                parts.append(edu['school'])
   348→   348→   348→   348→            if edu.get('degree'):
   349→   349→   349→   349→                parts.append(edu['degree'])
   350→   350→   350→   350→            if edu.get('major'):
   351→   351→   351→   351→                parts.append(edu['major'])
   352→   352→   352→   352→            console.print(f"    - {' | '.join(parts)}")
   353→   353→   353→   353→
   354→   354→   354→   354→    # Work experience
   355→   355→   355→   355→    work_exp = profile_data.get('work_experience', [])
   356→   356→   356→   356→    if work_exp:
   357→   357→   357→   357→        console.print("\n  [cyan]Work Experience:[/cyan]")
   358→   358→   358→   358→        for work in work_exp:
   359→   359→   359→   359→            line = ""
   360→   360→   360→   360→            if work.get('company'):
   361→   361→   361→   361→                line += work['company']
   362→   362→   362→   362→            if work.get('title'):
   363→   363→   363→   363→                line += f" - {work['title']}"
   364→   364→   364→   364→            if work.get('period'):
   365→   365→   365→   365→                line += f" ({work['period']})"
   366→   366→   366→   366→            console.print(f"    - {line}")
   367→   367→   367→   367→
   368→   368→   368→   368→    # Skills
   369→   369→   369→   369→    skills = profile_data.get('skills', [])
   370→   370→   370→   370→    if skills:
   371→   371→   371→   371→        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Skills:[/cyan] {', '.join(skills)}")
   372→   372→   372→   372→
   373→   373→   373→   373→    # Self description
   374→   374→   374→   374→    if basic_info.get('self_description'):
   375→   375→   375→   375→        desc = basic_info['self_description'][:200]
   376→   376→   376→   376→        console.print(f"\n  [cyan]Self Description:[/cyan]\n    {desc}")
   377→   377→   377→   377→
   378→   378→   378→   378→    console.print()
   379→   379→   379→   379→

1→     1→     1→     1→"""Message sending module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→Handles sending templated messages to candidates through Boss直聘's
     4→     4→     4→     4→chat system. Supports single and batch message sending with
     5→     5→     5→     5→human confirmation and rate limiting.
     6→     6→     6→     6→
     7→     7→     7→     7→Boss直聘 chat flow (verified 2026-03-03):
     8→     8→     8→     8→1. Navigate to /web/chat/index (chat page)
     9→     9→     9→     9→2. Click on conversation in left panel: div.geek-item[data-id="uid-0"]
    10→    10→    10→    10→3. Type message in #boss-chat-editor-input (contenteditable div)
    11→    11→    11→    11→4. Click div.submit ("发送") to send
    12→    12→    12→    12→5. Close dialog via span.iboss-close
    13→    13→    13→    13→
    14→    14→    14→    14→CRITICAL: Chat input is #boss-chat-editor-input (NOT #boss-chat-global-input).
    15→    15→    15→    15→Send button is div.submit (NOT a <button> element).
    16→    16→    16→    16→"""
    17→    17→    17→    17→
    18→    18→    18→    18→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    19→    19→    19→    19→from typing import Dict, List, Optional
    20→    20→    20→    20→
    21→    21→    21→    21→from patchright.async_api import Page
    22→    22→    22→    22→from loguru import logger
    23→    23→    23→    23→from rich.console import Console
    24→    24→    24→    24→from rich.panel import Panel
    25→    25→    25→    25→
    26→    26→    26→    26→import questionary
    27→    27→    27→    27→
    28→    28→    28→    28→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    29→    29→    29→    29→from src.utils.config import get_config
    30→    30→    30→    30→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    31→    31→    31→    31→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    32→    32→    32→    32→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    33→    33→    33→    33→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    34→    34→    34→    34→from src.utils.validators import validate_template_variables
    35→    35→    35→    35→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    36→    36→    36→    36→from src.exceptions.errors import (
    37→    37→    37→    37→    BrowserError,
    38→    38→    38→    38→    PermanentFailureError,
    39→    39→    39→    39→    SelectorNotFoundError,
    40→    40→    40→    40→)

    42→    42→    42→    42→console = Console()
    43→    43→    43→    43→
    44→    44→    44→    44→
    45→    45→    45→    45→def render_template(template: Dict, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
    46→    46→    46→    46→    """
    47→    47→    47→    47→    Render a message template with variable substitution.
    48→    48→    48→    48→
    49→    49→    49→    49→    Uses a single-pass approach to avoid recursive replacement issues
    50→    50→    50→    50→    (e.g., variable values containing {other_var} patterns).
    51→    51→    51→    51→
    52→    52→    52→    52→    Args:
    53→    53→    53→    53→        template: Template dict with 'content' and 'variables' keys
    54→    54→    54→    54→        variables: Variable name-value pairs
    55→    55→    55→    55→
    56→    56→    56→    56→    Returns:
    57→    57→    57→    57→        Rendered message string
    58→    58→    58→    58→    """
    59→    59→    59→    59→    import re
    60→    60→    60→    60→
    61→    61→    61→    61→    content = template['content']
    62→    62→    62→    62→
    63→    63→    63→    63→    def replacer(match):
    64→    64→    64→    64→        var_name = match.group(1)
    65→    65→    65→    65→        if var_name in variables:
    66→    66→    66→    66→            return str(variables[var_name])
    67→    67→    67→    67→        return match.group(0)  # Keep original if no matching variable
    68→    68→    68→    68→
    69→    69→    69→    69→    content = re.sub(r'\{(\w+)\}', replacer, content)
    70→    70→    70→    70→    return content
    71→    71→    71→    71→
    72→    72→    72→    72→
    73→    73→    73→    73→async def send_message(
    74→    74→    74→    74→    boss_id: str,
    75→    75→    75→    75→    template_name: str,
    76→    76→    76→    76→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
    77→    77→    77→    77→    preview_only: bool = False,
    78→    78→    78→    78→    interactive: bool = True,
    79→    79→    79→    79→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
    80→    80→    80→    80→) -> bool:
    81→    81→    81→    81→    """
    82→    82→    82→    82→    Send a templated message to a candidate on Boss直聘.
    83→    83→    83→    83→
    84→    84→    84→    84→    Args:
    85→    85→    85→    85→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
    86→    86→    86→    86→        template_name: Name of the message template
    87→    87→    87→    87→        variables: Template variable overrides
    88→    88→    88→    88→        preview_only: If True, only preview the message without sending
    89→    89→    89→    89→        browser: Browser manager instance
    90→    90→    90→    90→
    91→    91→    91→    91→    Returns:
    92→    92→    92→    92→        True if message sent successfully
    93→    93→    93→    93→    """
    94→    94→    94→    94→    if browser is None:
    95→    95→    95→    95→        browser = get_browser_manager()
    96→    96→    96→    96→
    97→    97→    97→    97→    page = browser.page
    98→    98→    98→    98→    if not page:
    99→    99→    99→    99→        page = await browser.start()
   100→   100→   100→   100→
   101→   101→   101→   101→    config = get_config()
   102→   102→   102→   102→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   103→   103→   103→   103→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   104→   104→   104→   104→
   105→   105→   105→   105→    # Load template
   106→   106→   106→   106→    template = config.get_template(template_name)
   107→   107→   107→   107→
   108→   108→   108→   108→    # Merge variables
   109→   109→   109→   109→    final_vars = dict(variables or {})
   110→   110→   110→   110→
   111→   111→   111→   111→    # Try to fill candidate info from database
   112→   112→   112→   112→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   113→   113→   113→   113→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   114→   114→   114→   114→        if candidate:
   115→   115→   115→   115→            if 'name' not in final_vars and candidate.name:
   116→   116→   116→   116→                final_vars['name'] = candidate.name
   117→   117→   117→   117→            if 'company' not in final_vars and candidate.company:
   118→   118→   118→   118→                final_vars['company'] = candidate.company
   119→   119→   119→   119→            if 'position' not in final_vars and candidate.title:
   120→   120→   120→   120→                final_vars['position'] = candidate.title
   121→   121→   121→   121→
   122→   122→   122→   122→    # Validate variables
   123→   123→   123→   123→    validate_template_variables(template, final_vars)
   124→   124→   124→   124→
   125→   125→   125→   125→    # Render message
   126→   126→   126→   126→    message_content = render_template(template, final_vars)
   127→   127→   127→   127→
   128→   128→   128→   128→    # Preview
   129→   129→   129→   129→    console.print(Panel(
   130→   130→   130→   130→        f"[bold]To:[/bold] {boss_id}\n"
   131→   131→   131→   131→        f"[bold]Template:[/bold] {template_name}\n"
   132→   132→   132→   132→        f"[bold]Message:[/bold]\n{message_content}",
   133→   133→   133→   133→        title="Message Preview",
   134→   134→   134→   134→        border_style="cyan"
   135→   135→   135→   135→    ))
   136→   136→   136→   136→
   137→   137→   137→   137→    if preview_only:
   138→   138→   138→   138→        console.print("[dim]Preview only — message not sent.[/dim]")
   139→   139→   139→   139→        return False
   140→   140→   140→   140→
   141→   141→   141→   141→    # Confirm send — skip confirmation in non-interactive mode (Web)
   142→   142→   142→   142→    import sys
   143→   143→   143→   143→    if not interactive:
   144→   144→   144→   144→        confirm = True
   145→   145→   145→   145→    elif sys.stdin.isatty():
   146→   146→   146→   146→        confirm = questionary.confirm(
   147→   147→   147→   147→            "Send this message?",
   148→   148→   148→   148→            default=False,
   149→   149→   149→   149→        ).ask()
   150→   150→   150→   150→    else:
   151→   151→   151→   151→        confirm = False
   152→   152→   152→   152→
   153→   153→   153→   153→    if not confirm:
   154→   154→   154→   154→        console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled.[/yellow]")
   155→   155→   155→   155→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'cancelled', db_manager)
   156→   156→   156→   156→        return False
   157→   157→   157→   157→
   158→   158→   158→   158→    # Rate limit check
   159→   159→   159→   159→    await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   160→   160→   160→   160→
   161→   161→   161→   161→    try:
   162→   162→   162→   162→        # Navigate to chat with the candidate
   163→   163→   163→   163→        success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   164→   164→   164→   164→        if not success:
   165→   165→   165→   165→            raise BrowserError(f"Failed to open chat with {boss_id}")
   166→   166→   166→   166→
   167→   167→   167→   167→        # Type and send the message
   168→   168→   168→   168→        await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   169→   169→   169→   169→
   170→   170→   170→   170→        # Log success
   171→   171→   171→   171→        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id, 'template': template_name})
   172→   172→   172→   172→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   173→   173→   173→   173→
   174→   174→   174→   174→        console.print(f"[green]Message sent to {boss_id}![/green]")
   175→   175→   175→   175→        return True
   176→   176→   176→   176→
   177→   177→   177→   177→    except PermanentFailureError as e:
   178→   178→   178→   178→        logger.error(f"Permanent failure sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   179→   179→   179→   179→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   180→   180→   180→   180→        rate_limiter.report_error()
   181→   181→   181→   181→        console.print(f"[red]Failed to send: {e}[/red]")
   182→   182→   182→   182→        return False
   183→   183→   183→   183→    except Exception as e:
   184→   184→   184→   184→        logger.error(f"Error sending message to {boss_id}: {e}")
   185→   185→   185→   185→        _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   186→   186→   186→   186→        rate_limiter.report_error()
   187→   187→   187→   187→        console.print(f"[red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   188→   188→   188→   188→        return False
   189→   189→   189→   189→
   190→   190→   190→   190→
   191→   191→   191→   191→async def send_message_batch(
   192→   192→   192→   192→    candidates: list,
   193→   193→   193→   193→    template_name: str,
   194→   194→   194→   194→    variables: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
   195→   195→   195→   195→    interactive: bool = True,
   196→   196→   196→   196→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   197→   197→   197→   197→    dry_run: bool = False,
   198→   198→   198→   198→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   199→   199→   199→   199→) -> Dict[str, int]:
   200→   200→   200→   200→    """
   201→   201→   201→   201→    Send messages to multiple candidates.
   202→   202→   202→   202→
   203→   203→   203→   203→    Args:
   204→   204→   204→   204→        candidates: List of CandidateBasic or dicts with boss_id
   205→   205→   205→   205→        template_name: Template name
   206→   206→   206→   206→        variables: Shared template variables
   207→   207→   207→   207→        interactive: Confirm each message individually
   208→   208→   208→   208→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged
   209→   209→   209→   209→        dry_run: Simulate without actually sending
   210→   210→   210→   210→        browser: Browser manager instance
   211→   211→   211→   211→
   212→   212→   212→   212→    Returns:
   213→   213→   213→   213→        Dict with counts: sent, failed, skipped, cancelled
   214→   214→   214→   214→    """
   215→   215→   215→   215→    if browser is None:
   216→   216→   216→   216→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   217→   217→   217→   217→
   218→   218→   218→   218→    config = get_config()
   219→   219→   219→   219→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   220→   220→   220→   220→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   221→   221→   221→   221→
   222→   222→   222→   222→    stats = {'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'cancelled': 0}
   223→   223→   223→   223→
   224→   224→   224→   224→    for i, candidate in enumerate(candidates):
   225→   225→   225→   225→        if isinstance(candidate, dict):
   226→   226→   226→   226→            boss_id = candidate.get('boss_id', '')
   227→   227→   227→   227→            name = candidate.get('name', '')
   228→   228→   228→   228→            title = candidate.get('title', '')
   229→   229→   229→   229→            company = candidate.get('company', '')
   230→   230→   230→   230→        else:
   231→   231→   231→   231→            boss_id = getattr(candidate, 'boss_id', '')
   232→   232→   232→   232→            name = getattr(candidate, 'name', '')
   233→   233→   233→   233→            title = getattr(candidate, 'title', '')
   234→   234→   234→   234→            company = getattr(candidate, 'company', '')
   235→   235→   235→   235→
   236→   236→   236→   236→        if not boss_id:
   237→   237→   237→   237→            stats['skipped'] += 1
   238→   238→   238→   238→            continue
   239→   239→   239→   239→
   240→   240→   240→   240→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]({i+1}/{len(candidates)})[/cyan] {name} - {title} @ {company}")
   241→   241→   241→   241→
   242→   242→   242→   242→        # Check if already messaged
   243→   243→   243→   243→        if skip_messaged:
   244→   244→   244→   244→            with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   245→   245→   245→   245→                existing_msg = session.query(Message).filter_by(
   246→   246→   246→   246→                    candidate_boss_id=boss_id, status='sent'
   247→   247→   247→   247→                ).first()
   248→   248→   248→   248→                if existing_msg:
   249→   249→   249→   249→                    console.print(f"  [dim]Already messaged, skipping[/dim]")
   250→   250→   250→   250→                    stats['skipped'] += 1
   251→   251→   251→   251→                    continue
   252→   252→   252→   252→
   253→   253→   253→   253→        if dry_run:
   254→   254→   254→   254→            console.print(f"  [dim]Dry run — would send '{template_name}' template[/dim]")
   255→   255→   255→   255→            stats['sent'] += 1
   256→   256→   256→   256→            continue
   257→   257→   257→   257→
   258→   258→   258→   258→        # Build per-candidate variables
   259→   259→   259→   259→        per_vars = dict(variables or {})
   260→   260→   260→   260→        if name:
   261→   261→   261→   261→            per_vars.setdefault('name', name)
   262→   262→   262→   262→        if company:
   263→   263→   263→   263→            per_vars.setdefault('company', company)
   264→   264→   264→   264→        if title:
   265→   265→   265→   265→            per_vars.setdefault('position', title)
   266→   266→   266→   266→
   267→   267→   267→   267→        try:
   268→   268→   268→   268→            if interactive:
   269→   269→   269→   269→                result = await send_message(
   270→   270→   270→   270→                    boss_id=boss_id,
   271→   271→   271→   271→                    template_name=template_name,
   272→   272→   272→   272→                    variables=per_vars,
   273→   273→   273→   273→                    browser=browser,
   274→   274→   274→   274→                )
   275→   275→   275→   275→                if result:
   276→   276→   276→   276→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   277→   277→   277→   277→                else:
   278→   278→   278→   278→                    stats['cancelled'] += 1
   279→   279→   279→   279→            else:
   280→   280→   280→   280→                # Non-interactive: send without confirmation
   281→   281→   281→   281→                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   282→   282→   282→   282→
   283→   283→   283→   283→                template = config.get_template(template_name)
   284→   284→   284→   284→                validate_template_variables(template, per_vars)
   285→   285→   285→   285→                message_content = render_template(template, per_vars)
   286→   286→   286→   286→
   287→   287→   287→   287→                page = browser.page
   288→   288→   288→   288→                success = await _navigate_to_chat(page, boss_id, db_manager)
   289→   289→   289→   289→                if success:
   290→   290→   290→   290→                    await _type_and_send_message(page, message_content)
   291→   291→   291→   291→                    rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {'boss_id': boss_id})
   292→   292→   292→   292→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'sent', db_manager)
   293→   293→   293→   293→                    stats['sent'] += 1
   294→   294→   294→   294→                    console.print(f"  [green]Sent![/green]")
   295→   295→   295→   295→                else:
   296→   296→   296→   296→                    _save_message_to_db(boss_id, template_name, message_content, 'failed', db_manager)
   297→   297→   297→   297→                    stats['failed'] += 1
   298→   298→   298→   298→                    console.print(f"  [red]Failed to open chat[/red]")
   299→   299→   299→   299→
   300→   300→   300→   300→        except Exception as e:
   301→   301→   301→   301→            logger.error(f"Error sending to {boss_id}: {e}")
   302→   302→   302→   302→            stats['failed'] += 1
   303→   303→   303→   303→            console.print(f"  [red]Error: {e}[/red]")
   304→   304→   304→   304→
   305→   305→   305→   305→        # Delay between messages
   306→   306→   306→   306→        if i < len(candidates) - 1:
   307→   307→   307→   307→            await async_random_delay('message')
   308→   308→   308→   308→
   309→   309→   309→   309→    # Summary
   310→   310→   310→   310→    console.print(Panel(
   311→   311→   311→   311→        f"[green]Sent: {stats['sent']}[/green] | "
   312→   312→   312→   312→        f"[red]Failed: {stats['failed']}[/red] | "
   313→   313→   313→   313→        f"[yellow]Skipped: {stats['skipped']}[/yellow] | "
   314→   314→   314→   314→        f"[dim]Cancelled: {stats['cancelled']}[/dim]",
   315→   315→   315→   315→        title="Batch Message Summary",
   316→   316→   316→   316→    ))
   317→   317→   317→   317→
   318→   318→   318→   318→    return stats
   319→   319→   319→   319→
   320→   320→   320→   320→
   321→   321→   321→   321→async def _navigate_to_chat(page: Page, boss_id: str, db_manager) -> bool:
   322→   322→   322→   322→    """
   323→   323→   323→   323→    Navigate to the chat window for a candidate.
   324→   324→   324→   324→
   325→   325→   325→   325→    Strategy 1: Go to /web/chat/index and find conversation by name
   326→   326→   326→   326→    Strategy 2: Use search page contact button (requires 搜索畅聊卡)
   327→   327→   327→   327→
   328→   328→   328→   328→    Args:
   329→   329→   329→   329→        page: Playwright page instance
   330→   330→   330→   330→        boss_id: Candidate Boss ID (e.g., "zp_81137184")
   331→   331→   331→   331→        db_manager: Database manager
   332→   332→   332→   332→
   333→   333→   333→   333→    Returns:
   334→   334→   334→   334→        True if chat window is ready for input
   335→   335→   335→   335→    """
   336→   336→   336→   336→    # Get candidate info from database
   337→   337→   337→   337→    candidate_name = None
   338→   338→   338→   338→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   339→   339→   339→   339→        candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(boss_id=boss_id).first()
   340→   340→   340→   340→        if candidate:
   341→   341→   341→   341→            candidate_name = candidate.name
   342→   342→   342→   342→
   343→   343→   343→   343→    # Strategy 1: Navigate to chat page and find existing conversation
   344→   344→   344→   344→    try:
   345→   345→   345→   345→        await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/index',
   346→   346→   346→   346→                               wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   347→   347→   347→   347→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   348→   348→   348→   348→        await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   349→   349→   349→   349→
   350→   350→   350→   350→        # Wait for conversation list to load
   351→   351→   351→   351→        try:
   352→   352→   352→   352→            await page.wait_for_selector('.geek-item', timeout=10000)
   353→   353→   353→   353→        except Exception:
   354→   354→   354→   354→            logger.warning("Conversation list did not load")
   355→   355→   355→   355→
   356→   356→   356→   356→        # Try to find the candidate in the conversation list
   357→   357→   357→   357→        # Match by data-id (which is the user ID, different from data-expect)
   358→   358→   358→   358→        # or by name text match
   359→   359→   359→   359→        if candidate_name:
   360→   360→   360→   360→            found = await page.evaluate("""
   361→   361→   361→   361→                (name) => {
   362→   362→   362→   362→                    const items = document.querySelectorAll('.geek-item');
   363→   363→   363→   363→                    for (const item of items) {
   364→   364→   364→   364→                        if (item.innerText.includes(name)) {
   365→   365→   365→   365→                            item.click();
   366→   366→   366→   366→                            return true;
   367→   367→   367→   367→                        }
   368→   368→   368→   368→                    }
   369→   369→   369→   369→                    return false;
   370→   370→   370→   370→                }
   371→   371→   371→   371→            """, candidate_name)
   372→   372→   372→   372→
   373→   373→   373→   373→            if found:
   374→   374→   374→   374→                await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   375→   375→   375→   375→                # Verify chat input is visible
   376→   376→   376→   376→                chat_input = await page.query_selector('#boss-chat-editor-input')
   377→   377→   377→   377→                if chat_input and await chat_input.is_visible():
   378→   378→   378→   378→                    return True
   379→   379→   379→   379→                logger.warning("Chat input not visible after clicking conversation")
   380→   380→   380→   380→
   381→   381→   381→   381→    except Exception as e:
   382→   382→   382→   382→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 1 (chat page) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   383→   383→   383→   383→
   384→   384→   384→   384→    # Strategy 2: Navigate to search page and use contact button
   385→   385→   385→   385→    # This requires 搜索畅聊卡 and may trigger purchase dialog
   386→   386→   386→   386→    expect_id = boss_id.replace('zp_', '') if boss_id.startswith('zp_') else boss_id
   387→   387→   387→   387→    try:
   388→   388→   388→   388→        await retry_navigation(page, 'https://www.zhipin.com/web/chat/search',
   389→   389→   389→   389→                               wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   390→   390→   390→   390→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   391→   391→   391→   391→
   392→   392→   392→   392→        # Get search iframe
   393→   393→   393→   393→        search_frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
   394→   394→   394→   394→        if not search_frame:
   395→   395→   395→   395→            for f in page.frames:
   396→   396→   396→   396→                if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
   397→   397→   397→   397→                    search_frame = f
   398→   398→   398→   398→                    break
   399→   399→   399→   399→
   400→   400→   400→   400→        if search_frame:
   401→   401→   401→   401→            # Find the candidate card by data-expect and click contact
   402→   402→   402→   402→            clicked = await search_frame.evaluate("""
   403→   403→   403→   403→                (expectId) => {
   404→   404→   404→   404→                    const link = document.querySelector('a[data-expect="' + expectId + '"]');
   405→   405→   405→   405→                    if (!link) return false;
   406→   406→   406→   406→                    const card = link.closest('.geek-info-card');
   407→   407→   407→   407→                    if (!card) return false;
   408→   408→   408→   408→                    const btn = card.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   409→   409→   409→   409→                    if (btn) {
   410→   410→   410→   410→                        btn.click();
   411→   411→   411→   411→                        return true;
   412→   412→   412→   412→                    }
   413→   413→   413→   413→                    return false;
   414→   414→   414→   414→                }
   415→   415→   415→   415→            """, expect_id)
   416→   416→   416→   416→
   417→   417→   417→   417→            if clicked:
   418→   418→   418→   418→                await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   419→   419→   419→   419→                # Check if chat opened (not a purchase dialog)
   420→   420→   420→   420→                chat_input = await page.query_selector('#boss-chat-editor-input')
   421→   421→   421→   421→                if chat_input and await chat_input.is_visible():
   422→   422→   422→   422→                    return True
   423→   423→   423→   423→
   424→   424→   424→   424→                # Close any purchase dialogs
   425→   425→   425→   425→                await _close_purchase_dialogs(page)
   426→   426→   426→   426→
   427→   427→   427→   427→    except Exception as e:
   428→   428→   428→   428→        logger.warning(f"Strategy 2 (search contact) failed for {boss_id}: {e}")
   429→   429→   429→   429→
   430→   430→   430→   430→    logger.error(f"All chat navigation strategies failed for {boss_id}")
   431→   431→   431→   431→    return False
   432→   432→   432→   432→
   433→   433→   433→   433→
   434→   434→   434→   434→async def _close_purchase_dialogs(page: Page) -> None:
   435→   435→   435→   435→    """Close purchase/promotional dialogs that may appear after clicking contact."""
   436→   436→   436→   436→    await page.evaluate("""
   437→   437→   437→   437→        () => {
   438→   438→   438→   438→            document.querySelectorAll('.dialog-wrap.active').forEach(d => {
   439→   439→   439→   439→                const wrapper = d.querySelector('.boss-popup__wrapper');
   440→   440→   440→   440→                const cls = wrapper?.className || '';
   441→   441→   441→   441→                if (cls.includes('discounts') || cls.includes('chat-card') || cls.includes('sale')) {
   442→   442→   442→   442→                    const close = d.querySelector('.boss-popup__close, .iboss-close');
   443→   443→   443→   443→                    if (close) close.click();
   444→   444→   444→   444→                }
   445→   445→   445→   445→            });
   446→   446→   446→   446→        }
   447→   447→   447→   447→    """)
   448→   448→   448→   448→    await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
   449→   449→   449→   449→
   450→   450→   450→   450→
   451→   451→   451→   451→async def _type_and_send_message(page: Page, message: str) -> None:
   452→   452→   452→   452→    """
   453→   453→   453→   453→    Type a message into the chat input and send it.
   454→   454→   454→   454→
   455→   455→   455→   455→    Chat input: #boss-chat-editor-input (contenteditable div)
   456→   456→   456→   456→    Send button: div.submit (text "发送")
   457→   457→   457→   457→
   458→   458→   458→   458→    Args:
   459→   459→   459→   459→        page: Playwright page instance
   460→   460→   460→   460→        message: Message text to send
   461→   461→   461→   461→    """
   462→   462→   462→   462→    # Find the message input
   463→   463→   463→   463→    # Verified: #boss-chat-editor-input is the chat input (contenteditable div)
   464→   464→   464→   464→    input_selectors = [
   465→   465→   465→   465→        '#boss-chat-editor-input',
   466→   466→   466→   466→        '[contenteditable="true"]',
   467→   467→   467→   467→    ]
   468→   468→   468→   468→
   469→   469→   469→   469→    input_element = None
   470→   470→   470→   470→    for selector in input_selectors:
   471→   471→   471→   471→        try:
   472→   472→   472→   472→            element = await page.query_selector(selector)
   473→   473→   473→   473→            if element and await element.is_visible():
   474→   474→   474→   474→                input_element = element
   475→   475→   475→   475→                break
   476→   476→   476→   476→        except Exception:
   477→   477→   477→   477→            continue
   478→   478→   478→   478→
   479→   479→   479→   479→    if not input_element:
   480→   480→   480→   480→        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Chat message input not found")
   481→   481→   481→   481→
   482→   482→   482→   482→    # Click to focus
   483→   483→   483→   483→    await input_element.click()
   484→   484→   484→   484→    await page.wait_for_timeout(300)
   485→   485→   485→   485→
   486→   486→   486→   486→    # Clear any existing content
   487→   487→   487→   487→    import sys
   488→   488→   488→   488→    select_all_key = "Meta+a" if sys.platform == "darwin" else "Control+a"
   489→   489→   489→   489→    await page.keyboard.press(select_all_key)
   490→   490→   490→   490→    await page.keyboard.press("Backspace")
   491→   491→   491→   491→    await page.wait_for_timeout(200)
   492→   492→   492→   492→
   493→   493→   493→   493→    # Type message
   494→   494→   494→   494→    if len(message) > 50:
   495→   495→   495→   495→        await input_element.fill(message)
   496→   496→   496→   496→    else:
   497→   497→   497→   497→        await input_element.type(message, delay=80)
   498→   498→   498→   498→
   499→   499→   499→   499→    await async_random_delay('action')
   500→   500→   500→   500→
   501→   501→   501→   501→    # Find and click send button
   502→   502→   502→   502→    # Verified: div.submit contains text "发送"
   503→   503→   503→   503→    send_selectors = [
   504→   504→   504→   504→        'div.submit',
   505→   505→   505→   505→        'text="发送"',
   506→   506→   506→   506→        'button:has-text("发送")',
   507→   507→   507→   507→    ]
   508→   508→   508→   508→
   509→   509→   509→   509→    for selector in send_selectors:
   510→   510→   510→   510→        try:
   511→   511→   511→   511→            btn = await page.query_selector(selector)
   512→   512→   512→   512→            if btn and await btn.is_visible():
   513→   513→   513→   513→                await btn.click()
   514→   514→   514→   514→                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   515→   515→   515→   515→                logger.info("Message sent via send button click")
   516→   516→   516→   516→                return
   517→   517→   517→   517→        except Exception:
   518→   518→   518→   518→            continue
   519→   519→   519→   519→
   520→   520→   520→   520→    # Fallback: try pressing Enter to send
   521→   521→   521→   521→    await page.keyboard.press("Enter")
   522→   522→   522→   522→    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   523→   523→   523→   523→    logger.info("Message sent via Enter key")
   524→   524→   524→   524→
   525→   525→   525→   525→
   526→   526→   526→   526→def _save_message_to_db(
   527→   527→   527→   527→    boss_id: str,
   528→   528→   528→   528→    template_name: str,
   529→   529→   529→   529→    content: str,
   530→   530→   530→   530→    status: str,
   531→   531→   531→   531→    db_manager,
   532→   532→   532→   532→) -> None:
   533→   533→   533→   533→    """Save a message record to the database."""
   534→   534→   534→   534→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   535→   535→   535→   535→        message = Message(
   536→   536→   536→   536→            candidate_boss_id=boss_id,
   537→   537→   537→   537→            template_name=template_name,
   538→   538→   538→   538→            content=content,
   539→   539→   539→   539→            status=status,
   540→   540→   540→   540→            sent_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc) if status == 'sent' else None,
   541→   541→   541→   541→        )
   542→   542→   542→   542→        session.add(message)
   543→   543→   543→   543→

1→     1→     1→     1→"""Candidate search module for Boss直聘.
     2→     2→     2→     2→
     3→     3→     3→     3→Handles searching for candidates on Boss直聘's talent search pages.
     4→     4→     4→     4→Search page: /web/chat/search — candidates are inside iframe[name='searchFrame'].
     5→     5→     5→     5→
     6→     6→     6→     6→CRITICAL ARCHITECTURE NOTE:
     7→     7→     7→     7→The search results live inside an iframe (searchFrame), NOT the main page DOM.
     8→     8→     8→     8→All evaluate() calls must target the iframe frame, not page directly.
     9→     9→     9→     9→Search uses "换一换" button to refresh results, not infinite scroll.
    10→    10→    10→    10→Candidate IDs come from data-expect attribute on card links.
    11→    11→    11→    11→"""
    12→    12→    12→    12→
    13→    13→    13→    13→import hashlib
    14→    14→    14→    14→from dataclasses import dataclass, field
    15→    15→    15→    15→from typing import List, Optional, Set
    16→    16→    16→    16→
    17→    17→    17→    17→from patchright.async_api import Page, Frame
    18→    18→    18→    18→from loguru import logger
    19→    19→    19→    19→from rich.console import Console
    20→    20→    20→    20→from rich.table import Table
    21→    21→    21→    21→
    22→    22→    22→    22→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    23→    23→    23→    23→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    24→    24→    24→    24→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    25→    25→    25→    25→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    26→    26→    26→    26→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    27→    27→    27→    27→from src.models.database import Candidate, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
    28→    28→    28→    28→console = Console()
    29→    29→    29→    29→

    31→    31→    31→    31→@dataclass
    32→    32→    32→    32→class CandidateBasic:
    33→    33→    33→    33→    """Basic candidate info extracted from search results."""
    34→    34→    34→    34→    boss_id: str
    35→    35→    35→    35→    name: str
    36→    36→    36→    36→    title: str
    37→    37→    37→    37→    company: str
    38→    38→    38→    38→    location: Optional[str] = None
    39→    39→    39→    39→    salary_expect: Optional[str] = None
    40→    40→    40→    40→    work_years: Optional[str] = None
    41→    41→    41→    41→    education_level: Optional[str] = None
    42→    42→    42→    42→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    43→    43→    43→    43→    active_status: Optional[str] = None
    44→    44→    44→    44→    school: Optional[str] = None
    45→    45→    45→    45→    major: Optional[str] = None
    46→    46→    46→    46→    job_status: Optional[str] = None
    47→    47→    47→    47→    self_desc: Optional[str] = None
    48→    48→    48→    48→    _score: int = field(default=0, init=False, repr=False)
    49→    49→    49→    49→
    50→    50→    50→    50→    def __hash__(self):
    51→    51→    51→    51→        return hash(self.boss_id)
    52→    52→    52→    52→
    53→    53→    53→    53→    def __eq__(self, other):
    54→    54→    54→    54→        if isinstance(other, CandidateBasic):
    55→    55→    55→    55→            return self.boss_id == other.boss_id
    56→    56→    56→    56→        return False
    57→    57→    57→    57→
    58→    58→    58→    58→
    59→    59→    59→    59→# Non-R&D roles to filter out
    60→    60→    60→    60→NON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    61→    61→    61→    61→    "销售", "产品经理", "市场", "运营", "行政", "人事", "财务",
    62→    62→    62→    62→    "法务", "采购", "客服", "前台", "助理", "秘书",
    63→    63→    63→    63→}
    64→    64→    64→    64→
    65→    65→    65→    65→
    66→    66→    66→    66→def _is_non_rd_role(title: str) -> bool:
    67→    67→    67→    67→    """Check if title indicates a non-R&D role."""
    68→    68→    68→    68→    if not title:
    69→    69→    69→    69→        return False
    70→    70→    70→    70→    for keyword in NON_RD_KEYWORDS:
    71→    71→    71→    71→        if keyword in title:
    72→    72→    72→    72→            return True
    73→    73→    73→    73→    return False
    74→    74→    74→    74→
    75→    75→    75→    75→
    76→    76→    76→    76→def _generate_boss_id(name: str, company: str) -> str:
    77→    77→    77→    77→    """Generate a fallback Boss ID from name + company hash."""
    78→    78→    78→    78→    raw = f"{name}_{company}"
    79→    79→    79→    79→    h = hashlib.sha256(raw.encode()).hexdigest()[:20]
    80→    80→    80→    80→    return f"zp_{h}"
    81→    81→    81→    81→

    83→    83→    83→    83→async def _get_search_frame(page: Page) -> Optional[Frame]:
    84→    84→    84→    84→    """Get the searchFrame iframe from the main page.
    85→    85→    85→    85→
    86→    86→    86→    86→    Boss直聘 search page loads candidates inside iframe[name='searchFrame'].
    87→    87→    87→    87→    Returns the Frame object for executing JS inside the iframe.
    88→    88→    88→    88→    """
    89→    89→    89→    89→    frame = page.frame(name='searchFrame')
    90→    90→    90→    90→    if frame:
    91→    91→    91→    91→        return frame
    92→    92→    92→    92→
    93→    93→    93→    93→    # Fallback: find by URL pattern
    94→    94→    94→    94→    for f in page.frames:
    95→    95→    95→    95→        if 'frame/search' in (f.url or ''):
    96→    96→    96→    96→            return f
    97→    97→    97→    97→
    98→    98→    98→    98→    return None
    99→    99→    99→    99→
   100→   100→   100→   100→
   101→   101→   101→   101→# JavaScript extraction for candidates inside searchFrame iframe.
   102→   102→   102→   102→# Targets: div.card-list > li.geek-info-card > a[data-expect]
   103→   103→   103→   103→EXTRACT_CANDIDATES_JS = """
   104→   104→   104→   104→() => {
   105→   105→   105→   105→    const candidates = [];
   106→   106→   106→   106→    const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.card-list .geek-info-card');
   107→   107→   107→   107→
   108→   108→   108→   108→    for (const card of cards) {
   109→   109→   109→   109→        try {
   110→   110→   110→   110→            const link = card.querySelector('a');
   111→   111→   111→   111→            if (!link) continue;
   112→   112→   112→   112→
   113→   113→   113→   113→            // Candidate ID from data-expect attribute
   114→   114→   114→   114→            const expectId = link.dataset.expect || '';
   115→   115→   115→   115→            if (!expectId) continue;
   116→   116→   116→   116→
   117→   117→   117→   117→            const bossId = 'zp_' + expectId;
   118→   118→   118→   118→
   119→   119→   119→   119→            // Name (anonymized, e.g. "卿**")
   120→   120→   120→   120→            const nameEl = card.querySelector('.name-label');
   121→   121→   121→   121→            const name = nameEl ? nameEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   122→   122→   122→   122→            if (!name) continue;
   123→   123→   123→   123→
   124→   124→   124→   124→            // Labels (e.g. "热搜")
   125→   125→   125→   125→            const labelEls = card.querySelectorAll('.card-label');
   126→   126→   126→   126→            const labels = Array.from(labelEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   127→   127→   127→   127→
   128→   128→   128→   128→            // Active status (e.g. "3日内活跃")
   129→   129→   129→   129→            const activeEl = card.querySelector('.active-desc-text');
   130→   130→   130→   130→            const activeStatus = activeEl ? activeEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   131→   131→   131→   131→
   132→   132→   132→   132→            // Info labels: age, work years, education, job status, salary
   133→   133→   133→   133→            const infoLabels = card.querySelectorAll('.info-labels > .label-text');
   134→   134→   134→   134→            const infoTexts = Array.from(infoLabels).map(el => el.innerText.trim());
   135→   135→   135→   135→
   136→   136→   136→   136→            let age = '', workYears = '', education = '', jobStatus = '', salary = '';
   137→   137→   137→   137→            for (const text of infoTexts) {
   138→   138→   138→   138→                if (text.includes('岁')) age = text;
   139→   139→   139→   139→                else if (text.includes('年') && !text.includes('岁')) workYears = text;
   140→   140→   140→   140→                else if (['博士', '硕士', '本科', '大专', '中专', '高中'].some(d => text.includes(d))) education = text;
   141→   141→   141→   141→                else if (text.includes('在职') || text.includes('离职') || text.includes('求职')) jobStatus = text;
   142→   142→   142→   142→                else if (text.includes('K') || text.includes('k') || text.includes('薪')) salary = text;
   143→   143→   143→   143→            }
   144→   144→   144→   144→
   145→   145→   145→   145→            // Self description / detail
   146→   146→   146→   146→            const detailEl = card.querySelector('.info-detail');
   147→   147→   147→   147→            const selfDesc = detailEl ? detailEl.innerText.trim() : '';
   148→   148→   148→   148→
   149→   149→   149→   149→            // Expect city
   150→   150→   150→   150→            const expectCityEls = card.querySelectorAll('.expect-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   151→   151→   151→   151→            const expectCity = Array.from(expectCityEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean).join(' ');
   152→   152→   152→   152→
   153→   153→   153→   153→            // Work experience (company + title)
   154→   154→   154→   154→            const workExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.work-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   155→   155→   155→   155→            const workExpTexts = Array.from(workExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   156→   156→   156→   156→            const company = workExpTexts[0] || '';
   157→   157→   157→   157→            const title = workExpTexts[1] || '';
   158→   158→   158→   158→
   159→   159→   159→   159→            // Education (school + major)
   160→   160→   160→   160→            const eduExpEls = card.querySelectorAll('.edu-exp-box .t-tooltip-slot');
   161→   161→   161→   161→            const eduTexts = Array.from(eduExpEls).map(el => el.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean);
   162→   162→   162→   162→            const school = eduTexts[0] || '';
   163→   163→   163→   163→            const major = eduTexts[1] || '';
   164→   164→   164→   164→
   165→   165→   165→   165→            // Contact button status
   166→   166→   166→   166→            const contactBtn = card.querySelector('.btn-getcontact');
   167→   167→   167→   167→            const contactText = contactBtn ? contactBtn.innerText.trim() : '';
   168→   168→   168→   168→
   169→   169→   169→   169→            // Elite/hot candidate flag
   170→   170→   170→   170→            const isElite = link.dataset.elitegeek === '1';
   171→   171→   171→   171→
   172→   172→   172→   172→            candidates.push({
   173→   173→   173→   173→                boss_id: bossId,
   174→   174→   174→   174→                name: name,
   175→   175→   175→   175→                title: title,
   176→   176→   176→   176→                company: company,
   177→   177→   177→   177→                location: expectCity,
   178→   178→   178→   178→                salary_expect: salary,
   179→   179→   179→   179→                work_years: workYears,
   180→   180→   180→   180→                education_level: education,
   181→   181→   181→   181→                active_status: activeStatus,
   182→   182→   182→   182→                school: school,
   183→   183→   183→   183→                major: major,
   184→   184→   184→   184→                job_status: jobStatus,
   185→   185→   185→   185→                self_desc: selfDesc,
   186→   186→   186→   186→                age: age,
   187→   187→   187→   187→                labels: labels,
   188→   188→   188→   188→                is_elite: isElite,
   189→   189→   189→   189→                contact_text: contactText,
   190→   190→   190→   190→                profile_url: ''
   191→   191→   191→   191→            });
   192→   192→   192→   192→        } catch (e) {
   193→   193→   193→   193→            console.error('Error extracting candidate:', e);
   194→   194→   194→   194→        }
   195→   195→   195→   195→    }
   196→   196→   196→   196→
   197→   197→   197→   197→    return candidates;
   198→   198→   198→   198→}
   199→   199→   199→   199→"""
   200→   200→   200→   200→
   201→   201→   201→   201→
   202→   202→   202→   202→async def search_candidates(
   203→   203→   203→   203→    keywords: List[str],
   204→   204→   204→   204→    location: Optional[str] = None,
   205→   205→   205→   205→    max_pages: int = 1,
   206→   206→   206→   206→    experience: Optional[str] = None,
   207→   207→   207→   207→    education: Optional[str] = None,
   208→   208→   208→   208→    salary: Optional[str] = None,
   209→   209→   209→   209→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   210→   210→   210→   210→    start_page: int = 1,
   211→   211→   211→   211→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   212→   212→   212→   212→    """
   213→   213→   213→   213→    Search for candidates on Boss直聘.
   214→   214→   214→   214→
   215→   215→   215→   215→    Navigates to search page, types keyword in iframe search input,
   216→   216→   216→   216→    extracts candidates from card list, and optionally refreshes
   217→   217→   217→   217→    via "换一换" button for more results.
   218→   218→   218→   218→
   219→   219→   219→   219→    Args:
   220→   220→   220→   220→        keywords: List of search keywords
   221→   221→   221→   221→        location: Location filter (e.g., "北京")
   222→   222→   222→   222→        max_pages: Number of "换一换" refresh rounds per keyword
   223→   223→   223→   223→        experience: Experience filter
   224→   224→   224→   224→        education: Education filter
   225→   225→   225→   225→        salary: Salary filter
   226→   226→   226→   226→        browser: Browser manager instance
   227→   227→   227→   227→        start_page: Starting refresh round (for resume)
   228→   228→   228→   228→
   229→   229→   229→   229→    Returns:
   230→   230→   230→   230→        List of CandidateBasic instances
   231→   231→   231→   231→    """
   232→   232→   232→   232→    if browser is None:
   233→   233→   233→   233→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   234→   234→   234→   234→
   235→   235→   235→   235→    page = browser.page
   236→   236→   236→   236→    if not page:
   237→   237→   237→   237→        page = await browser.start()
   238→   238→   238→   238→
   239→   239→   239→   239→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   240→   240→   240→   240→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   241→   241→   241→   241→
   242→   242→   242→   242→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   243→   243→   243→   243→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   244→   244→   244→   244→    seen_dedup_keys: Set[str] = set()
   245→   245→   245→   245→
   246→   246→   246→   246→    for keyword in keywords:
   247→   247→   247→   247→        console.print(f"\n[cyan]Searching for: {keyword}[/cyan]")
   248→   248→   248→   248→
   249→   249→   249→   249→        # Rate limit check
   250→   250→   250→   250→        await async_check_rate_limit('search')
